To address these limitations, we propose BuildMamba, a unified multi-task framework designed to exploit the linear-time global modeling of visual state-space models. Motivated by the need for stronger structural coupling and computational efficiency, we introduce three modules: a Mamba Attention Module for dynamic spatial recalibration, a Spatial-Aware Mamba-FPN for multi-scale feature aggregation via gated state-space scans, and a Mask-Aware Height Refinement module using semantic priors to suppress height artifacts. Extensive experiments demonstrate that BuildMamba establishes a new performance upper bound across three benchmarks. Specifically, it achieves an IoU of 0.93 and RMSE of 1.77~m on DFC23 benchmark, surpassing state-of-the-art by 0.82~m in height estimation. Simulation results confirm the model's superior robustness and scalability for large-scale 3D urban reconstruction.

</details>


### [260] [SecAgent: Efficient Mobile GUI Agent with Semantic Context](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08533)
*Yiping Xie,Song Chen,Jingxuan Xing,Wei Jiang,Zekun Zhu,Yingyao Wang,Pi Bu,Jun Song,Yuning Jiang,Bo Zheng*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: SecAgent是一个3B规模的移动GUI代理，通过构建中文移动GUI数据集和提出语义上下文机制，在移动界面自动化任务中实现了高效性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有移动GUI代理面临两个关键限制：高质量多语言数据集稀缺（特别是非英语生态系统），以及历史表示方法效率低下。

Method: 首先构建包含18k标注样本和121k导航步骤的中文移动GUI数据集；然后提出语义上下文机制，将历史屏幕截图和动作提炼为简洁的自然语言摘要；最后通过监督和强化微调训练模型。

Result: SecAgent在类似规模基线中表现优异，在作者构建的和公开的导航基准测试中，性能可与7B-8B模型相媲美。

Conclusion: SecAgent通过高质量中文数据集和高效的语义上下文机制，有效解决了多语言移动GUI自动化的关键挑战，将开源数据集、基准测试、模型和代码以促进相关研究。

Abstract: Mobile Graphical User Interface (GUI) agents powered by multimodal large language models have demonstrated promising capabilities in automating complex smartphone tasks. However, existing approaches face two critical limitations: the scarcity of high-quality multilingual datasets, particularly for non-English ecosystems, and inefficient history representation methods. To address these challenges, we present SecAgent, an efficient mobile GUI agent at 3B scale. We first construct a human-verified Chinese mobile GUI dataset with 18k grounding samples and 121k navigation steps across 44 applications, along with a Chinese navigation benchmark featuring multi-choice action annotations. Building upon this dataset, we propose a semantic context mechanism that distills history screenshots and actions into concise, natural language summaries, significantly reducing computational costs while preserving task-relevant information. Through supervised and reinforcement fine-tuning, SecAgent outperforms similar-scale baselines and achieves performance comparable to 7B-8B models on our and public navigation benchmarks. We will open-source the training dataset, benchmark, model, and code to advance research in multilingual mobile GUI automation.

</details>


### [261] [SWIFT: Sliding Window Reconstruction for Few-Shot Training-Free Generated Video Attribution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08536)
*Chao Wang,Zijin Yang,Yaofei Wang,Yuang Qi,Weiming Zhang,Nenghai Yu,Kejiang Chen*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: SWIFT 是一种无需训练、少样本的视频生成溯源方法，通过利用视频块内"像素帧到潜帧"的时序映射，采用固定长度滑动窗口进行正常和损坏两种重建，利用损失差异作为溯源信号，在5个SOTA视频生成模型上达到90%以上平均溯源准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着视频生成技术的快速发展，生成内容可能被滥用的问题日益突出。追踪视频来源对于防止滥用和确定责任方至关重要。现有视频溯源方法需要额外操作或训练溯源模型，可能降低视频质量或需要大量训练样本。

Method: SWIFT 首次定义了"少样本、无需训练的视频生成溯源"任务，紧密整合视频的时序特性。利用每个视频块内"像素帧到潜帧"的时序映射，采用固定长度滑动窗口执行两种重建：正常重建和损坏重建，然后利用两种重建损失的变化作为溯源信号。

Result: 在5个SOTA视频生成模型上进行了广泛评估，实验结果显示SWIFT仅需20个视频样本就能在所有模型上达到超过90%的平均溯源准确率，甚至能够对HunyuanVideo、EasyAnimate和Wan2.2实现零样本溯源。

Conclusion: SWIFT 是一种有效的少样本、无需训练的视频生成溯源方法，能够准确追踪视频来源，为解决视频生成技术可能带来的滥用问题提供了实用解决方案。

Abstract: Recent advancements in video generation technologies have been significant, resulting in their widespread application across multiple domains. However, concerns have been mounting over the potential misuse of generated content. Tracing the origin of generated videos has become crucial to mitigate potential misuse and identify responsible parties. Existing video attribution methods require additional operations or the training of source attribution models, which may degrade video quality or necessitate large amounts of training samples. To address these challenges, we define for the first time the "few-shot training-free generated video attribution" task and propose SWIFT, which is tightly integrated with the temporal characteristics of the video. By leveraging the "Pixel Frames(many) to Latent Frame(one)" temporal mapping within each video chunk, SWIFT applies a fixed-length sliding window to perform two distinct reconstructions: normal and corrupted. The variation in the losses between two reconstructions is then used as an attribution signal. We conducted an extensive evaluation of five state-of-the-art (SOTA) video generation models. Experimental results show that SWIFT achieves over 90% average attribution accuracy with merely 20 video samples across all models and even enables zero-shot attribution for HunyuanVideo, EasyAnimate, and Wan2.2. Our source code is available at https://github.com/wangchao0708/SWIFT.

</details>


### [262] [PCFEx: Point Cloud Feature Extraction for Graph Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08540)
*Abdullah Al Masud,Shi Xintong,Mondher Bouazizi,Ohtsuki Tomoaki*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该研究提出结合点云特征提取（PCFEx）与图神经网络（GNN）的框架，用于毫米波雷达点云数据的人体姿态估计（HPE）和人体活动识别（HAR），在四个公开数据集上显著超越现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 针对3D点云数据在人体姿态估计和活动识别任务中的处理需求，探索如何有效利用图神经网络捕捉点云的结构信息，以提升毫米波雷达数据的分析精度。

Method: 提出点云特征提取（PCFEx）技术，在点、边和图三个层次提取特征；设计专门的GNN架构高效处理这些特征；在四个毫米波雷达数据集（三个HPE、一个HAR）上进行评估。

Result: 在三个HPE基准测试中显著降低误差；在毫米波HAR任务上达到98.8%的整体准确率，超越现有最优模型。

Conclusion: 研究表明，特征提取与GNN建模相结合的方法能有效提升点云处理的精度，在毫米波雷达的人体姿态估计和活动识别任务中展现出巨大潜力。

Abstract: Graph neural networks (GNNs) have gained significant attention for their effectiveness across various domains. This study focuses on applying GNN to process 3D point cloud data for human pose estimation (HPE) and human activity recognition (HAR). We propose novel point cloud feature extraction (PCFEx) techniques to capture meaningful information at the point, edge, and graph levels of the point cloud by considering point cloud as a graph. Moreover, we introduce a GNN architecture designed to efficiently process these features. Our approach is evaluated on four most popular publicly available millimeter wave radar datasets, three for HPE and one for HAR. The results show substantial improvements, with significantly reduced errors in all three HPE benchmarks, and an overall accuracy of 98.8% in mmWave-based HAR, outperforming the existing state of the art models. This work demonstrates the great potential of feature extraction incorporated with GNN modeling approach to enhance the precision of point cloud processing.

</details>


### [263] [mmGAT: Pose Estimation by Graph Attention with Mutual Features from mmWave Radar Point Cloud](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08551)
*Abdullah Al Masud,Shi Xintong,Mondher Bouazizi,Ohtsuki Tomoaki*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 基于毫米波雷达和GNN架构的人体姿态估计新方法mmGAT，在隐私保护和低光环境下表现优异，在公开数据集上创下新SOTA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 图像姿态估计和动作识别在隐私保护和低光环境下表现不足，毫米波雷达技术能提供更好的隐私保护和环境适应性。

Method: 使用毫米波雷达数据，结合图神经网络（GNN）架构和注意力机制，提出独特的特征提取技术处理雷达点云数据。

Result: 在两个公开毫米波数据集上表现卓越，在大多数场景中创下新SOTA，MPJPE降低35.6%，PA-MPJPE降低14.1%。

Conclusion: mmGAT方法在毫米波雷达人体姿态估计领域取得了显著性能提升，为隐私保护和低光环境下的姿态估计提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Pose estimation and human action recognition (HAR) are pivotal technologies spanning various domains. While the image-based pose estimation and HAR are widely admired for their superior performance, they lack in privacy protection and suboptimal performance in low-light and dark environments. This paper exploits the capabilities of millimeter-wave (mmWave) radar technology for human pose estimation by processing radar data with Graph Neural Network (GNN) architecture, coupled with the attention mechanism. Our goal is to capture the finer details of the radar point cloud to improve the pose estimation performance. To this end, we present a unique feature extraction technique that exploits the full potential of the GNN processing method for pose estimation. Our model mmGAT demonstrates remarkable performance on two publicly available benchmark mmWave datasets and establishes new state of the art results in most scenarios in terms of human pose estimation. Our approach achieves a noteworthy reduction of pose estimation mean per joint position error (MPJPE) by 35.6% and PA-MPJPE by 14.1% from the current state of the art benchmark within this domain.

</details>


### [264] [BioGait-VLM: A Tri-Modal Vision-Language-Biomechanics Framework for Interpretable Clinical Gait Assessment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08564)
*Erdong Chen,Yuyang Ji,Jacob K. Greenberg,Benjamin Steel,Faraz Arkam,Abigail Lewis,Pranay Singh,Feng Liu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: BioGait-VLM：三模态视觉-语言-生物力学框架，通过时序证据蒸馏和生物力学标记化提升步态分析的泛化性和临床可解释性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 视频步态分析模型易过拟合环境偏差而非病理特征，需要解决泛化性差和缺乏可解释性的问题。

Method: 提出三模态框架，包含时序证据蒸馏分支捕获节奏动态，生物力学标记化分支将3D骨架序列投影为语言对齐的语义标记，实现独立于视觉捷径的关节力学推理。

Result: 在GAVD数据集增强的8类分类任务中达到SOTA准确率；专家盲评证实生物力学标记显著提升临床合理性和证据基础。

Conclusion: BioGait-VLM为透明、隐私增强的步态评估提供了可行路径，通过生物力学标记化实现可解释的临床推理。

Abstract: Video-based Clinical Gait Analysis often suffers from poor generalization as models overfit environmental biases instead of capturing pathological motion. To address this, we propose BioGait-VLM, a tri-modal Vision-Language-Biomechanics framework for interpretable clinical gait assessment. Unlike standard video encoders, our architecture incorporates a Temporal Evidence Distillation branch to capture rhythmic dynamics and a Biomechanical Tokenization branch that projects 3D skeleton sequences into language-aligned semantic tokens. This enables the model to explicitly reason about joint mechanics independent of visual shortcuts. To ensure rigorous benchmarking, we augment the public GAVD dataset with a high-fidelity Degenerative Cervical Myelopathy (DCM) cohort to form a unified 8-class taxonomy, establishing a strict subject-disjoint protocol to prevent data leakage. Under this setting, BioGait-VLM achieves state-of-the-art recognition accuracy. Furthermore, a blinded expert study confirms that biomechanical tokens significantly improve clinical plausibility and evidence grounding, offering a path toward transparent, privacy-enhanced gait assessment.

</details>


### [265] [Online Sparse Synthetic Aperture Radar Imaging](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08582)
*Conor Flynn,Radoslav Ivanov,Birsen Yazici*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出Online FISTA算法用于合成孔径雷达(SAR)在线重建，通过增量稀疏编码减少内存需求，支持下游任务如自动目标识别的在线处理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代防御应用依赖廉价自主无人机，但面临机载算法计算和内存效率的挑战。SAR应用中需处理大量数据，传统方法需存储全部信号数据，内存需求大。

Method: 提出Online FISTA算法，通过稀疏编码增量重建场景。算法递归更新存储矩阵而非存储所有接收信号数据，大幅降低内存需求。

Result: 算法实现内存高效的在線SAR图像重建，支持复杂下游任务如自动目标识别(ATR)的在线处理，相比现有后采集重建和ATR方法更灵活集成。

Conclusion: Online FISTA为SAR应用提供了一种内存高效的在线重建框架，能够实时处理数据并支持下游任务，提升了无人机防御系统的整体效能。

Abstract: With modern defense applications increasingly relying on inexpensive, autonomous drones, lies the major challenge of designing computationally and memory-efficient onboard algorithms to fulfill mission objectives. This challenge is particularly significant in Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR), where large volumes of data must be collected and processed for downstream tasks. We propose an online reconstruction method, the Online Fast Iterative Shrinkage-Thresholding Algorithm (Online FISTA), which incrementally reconstructs a scene with limited data through sparse coding. Rather than requiring storage of all received signal data, the algorithm recursively updates storage matrices for each iteration, greatly reducing memory demands. Online SAR image reconstruction facilitates more complex downstream tasks, such as Automatic Target Recognition (ATR), in an online manner, resulting in a more versatile and integrated framework compared to existing post-collection reconstruction and ATR approaches.

</details>


### [266] [CARE-Edit: Condition-Aware Routing of Experts for Contextual Image Editing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08589)
*Yucheng Wang,Zedong Wang,Yuetong Wu,Yue Ma,Dan Xu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: CARE-Edit提出一种基于条件感知专家路由的扩散模型编辑框架，通过动态分配计算给四个专门化专家（文本、掩码、参考、基础）来解决多模态条件冲突问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有统一的扩散编辑器使用固定共享骨干网络处理多样化编辑任务，存在任务干扰和异构需求适应不良的问题。特别是ControlNet和OmniControl等变体通过静态拼接或加法适配器组合多条件信号，无法动态优先处理或抑制冲突模态，导致跨掩码边界的颜色渗漏、身份或风格漂移等伪影。

Method: 提出条件感知专家路由（CARE-Edit）框架：1）掩码重绘模块首先细化用户定义的粗糙掩码以提供精确空间引导；2）轻量级潜在注意力路由器基于多模态条件和扩散时间步，通过稀疏top-K选择动态分配计算给四个专门化专家（文本、掩码、参考、基础）；3）潜在混合模块随后融合专家输出，将语义、空间和风格信息连贯地整合到基础图像中。

Result: 实验验证了CARE-Edit在上下文编辑任务上的强大性能，包括擦除、替换、文本驱动编辑和风格迁移。经验分析进一步揭示了专门化专家的任务特定行为，展示了动态条件感知处理对缓解多条件冲突的重要性。

Conclusion: CARE-Edit通过条件感知专家路由机制，实现了对多模态编辑条件的动态处理，有效解决了现有统一扩散编辑器中存在的任务干扰和多条件冲突问题，为复杂编辑任务提供了更精确和连贯的解决方案。

Abstract: Unified diffusion editors often rely on a fixed, shared backbone for diverse tasks, suffering from task interference and poor adaptation to heterogeneous demands (e.g., local vs global, semantic vs photometric). In particular, prevalent ControlNet and OmniControl variants combine multiple conditioning signals (e.g., text, mask, reference) via static concatenation or additive adapters which cannot dynamically prioritize or suppress conflicting modalities, thus resulting in artifacts like color bleeding across mask boundaries, identity or style drift, and unpredictable behavior under multi-condition inputs. To address this, we propose Condition-Aware Routing of Experts (CARE-Edit) that aligns model computation with specific editing competencies. At its core, a lightweight latent-attention router assigns encoded diffusion tokens to four specialized experts--Text, Mask, Reference, and Base--based on multi-modal conditions and diffusion timesteps: (i) a Mask Repaint module first refines coarse user-defined masks for precise spatial guidance; (ii) the router applies sparse top-K selection to dynamically allocate computation to the most relevant experts; (iii) a Latent Mixture module subsequently fuses expert outputs, coherently integrating semantic, spatial, and stylistic information to the base images. Experiments validate CARE-Edit's strong performance on contextual editing tasks, including erasure, replacement, text-driven edits, and style transfer. Empirical analysis further reveals task-specific behavior of specialized experts, showcasing the importance of dynamic, condition-aware processing to mitigate multi-condition conflicts.

</details>


### [267] [PRISM: Streaming Human Motion Generation with Per-Joint Latent Decomposition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08590)
*Zeyu Ling,Qing Shuai,Teng Zhang,Shiyang Li,Bo Han,Changqing Zou*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: PRISM提出了一种新的运动生成方法，通过联合因子化的运动潜在空间和噪声自由条件注入，统一了文本到运动、姿态条件生成和长序列合成等多种任务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有运动生成方法存在两个主要问题：一是运动自编码器将每帧压缩为单一潜在向量，导致轨迹和关节旋转纠缠在非结构化表示中；二是不同任务需要单独模型或特定机制，自回归方法在长序列中误差累积严重。

Method: 1. 联合因子化运动潜在空间：每个身体关节有自己的token，形成时间×关节的2D网格结构，通过因果VAE压缩并加入前向运动学监督。2. 噪声自由条件注入：每个潜在token携带自己的时间步嵌入，允许条件帧作为干净token注入，其余token去噪。结合自强制训练抑制长序列漂移。

Result: 在HumanML3D、MotionHub、BABEL等多个基准测试中达到最先进水平，并在50场景用户研究中表现优异。单一模型能统一处理文本到运动、姿态条件生成、自回归序列生成和叙事运动组合。

Conclusion: PRISM通过改进潜在空间设计和条件注入机制，显著提升了运动生成质量，证明了潜在空间设计是之前被低估的瓶颈，为运动生成提供了统一的基础模型框架。

Abstract: Text-to-motion generation has advanced rapidly, yet two challenges persist. First, existing motion autoencoders compress each frame into a single monolithic latent vector, entangling trajectory and per-joint rotations in an unstructured representation that downstream generators struggle to model faithfully. Second, text-to-motion, pose-conditioned generation, and long-horizon sequential synthesis typically require separate models or task-specific mechanisms, with autoregressive approaches suffering from severe error accumulation over extended rollouts.
  We present PRISM, addressing each challenge with a dedicated contribution. (1) A joint-factorized motion latent space: each body joint occupies its own token, forming a structured 2D grid (time
  joints) compressed by a causal VAE with forward-kinematics supervision. This simple change to the latent space -- without modifying the generator -- substantially improves generation quality, revealing that latent space design has been an underestimated bottleneck. (2) Noise-free condition injection: each latent token carries its own timestep embedding, allowing conditioning frames to be injected as clean tokens (timestep0) while the remaining tokens are denoised. This unifies text-to-motion and pose-conditioned generation in a single model, and directly enables autoregressive segment chaining for streaming synthesis. Self-forcing training further suppresses drift in long rollouts. With these two components, we train a single motion generation foundation model that seamlessly handles text-to-motion, pose-conditioned generation, autoregressive sequential generation, and narrative motion composition, achieving state-of-the-art on HumanML3D, MotionHub, BABEL, and a 50-scenario user study.

</details>


### [268] [Boosting MLLM Spatial Reasoning with Geometrically Referenced 3D Scene Representations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08592)
*Jiangye Yuan,Gowri Kumar,Baoyuan Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: GR3D是一种将3D几何属性编码为文本引用的3D场景表示方法，无需额外训练即可提升MLLMs在3D空间推理任务上的表现


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多模态大语言模型在2D视觉理解方面取得了显著成功，但在3D空间推理能力上仍然有限，需要解决这一能力差距

Method: 提出几何参考3D场景表示(GR3D)：为输入图像中的物体分配唯一ID，将其3D几何属性编码为基于这些ID索引的文本引用，使MLLMs能够利用其语言推理能力理解3D线索

Result: 在零样本设置下，该方法将GPT-5在VSI-Bench上的整体性能提升8%，在依赖空间布局理解的任务上提升超过11%；定性研究表明GR3D使MLLMs能够用极稀疏的输入视图进行复杂空间推理

Conclusion: GR3D是一种简单有效的3D场景表示方法，无需额外训练即可增强MLLMs的3D空间推理能力，为多模态模型的3D理解提供了新途径

Abstract: While Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have achieved remarkable success in 2D visual understanding, their ability to reason about 3D space remains limited. To address this gap, we introduce geometrically referenced 3D scene representations (GR3D). Given a set of input images, GR3D annotates objects in the images with unique IDs and encodes their 3D geometric attributes as textual references indexed by these IDs. This representation enables MLLMs to interpret 3D cues using their advanced language-based skills in mathematical reasoning, while concurrently analyzing 2D visual features in a tightly coupled way. We present a simple yet effective approach based on GR3D, which requires no additional training and is readily applicable to different MLLMs. Implemented in a zero-shot setting, our approach boosts GPT-5's performance on VSI-Bench by 8% overall and more than 11% on tasks that rely heavily on spatial layout understanding. Qualitative studies further demonstrate that GR3D empowers MLLMs to perform complex spatial reasoning with highly sparse input views.

</details>


### [269] [Weakly Supervised Teacher-Student Framework with Progressive Pseudo-mask Refinement for Gland Segmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08605)
*Hikmat Khan,Wei Chen,Muhammad Khalid Khan Niazi*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出基于教师-学生框架的弱监督方法，利用稀疏病理标注和EMA稳定教师网络生成精细伪掩码，实现结直肠癌腺体分割


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 结直肠癌组织病理学分级依赖腺体结构准确分割，当前深度学习方法需要大量像素级标注，但临床实践中获取困难。弱监督语义分割提供有前景的替代方案，但现有基于类激活图的方法常产生不完整的伪掩码，过度强调高判别性区域而无法监督未标注腺体结构。

Method: 提出弱监督教师-学生框架，利用稀疏病理标注和EMA稳定教师网络生成精细伪掩码。方法包括：基于置信度过滤、教师预测与有限真值自适应融合、课程引导细化，逐步分割未标注腺体区域。在机构数据集（60张H&E染色全切片）和公开数据集（Gland Segmentation、TCGA COAD、TCGA READ、SPIDER）上评估。

Result: 在Gland Segmentation数据集上达到平均IoU 80.10和平均Dice系数89.10。跨队列评估显示在TCGA COAD和TCGA READ上具有稳健泛化能力，无需额外标注；在SPIDER上性能下降反映领域偏移。

Conclusion: 该框架为结直肠癌组织病理学中的腺体分割提供了标注高效且可泛化的方法。

Abstract: Background and objectives: Colorectal cancer histopathological grading depends on accurate segmentation of glandular structures. Current deep learning approaches rely on large scale pixel level annotations that are labor intensive and difficult to obtain in routine clinical practice. Weakly supervised semantic segmentation offers a promising alternative. However, class activation map based methods often produce incomplete pseudo masks that emphasize highly discriminative regions and fail to supervise unannotated glandular structures. We propose a weakly supervised teacher student framework that leverages sparse pathologist annotations and an Exponential Moving Average stabilized teacher network to generate refined pseudo masks.
  Methods: The framework integrates confidence based filtering, adaptive fusion of teacher predictions with limited ground truth, and curriculum guided refinement to progressively segment unannotated glandular regions. The method was evaluated on an institutional colorectal cancer cohort from The Ohio State University Wexner Medical Center consisting of 60 hematoxylin and eosin stained whole slide images and on public datasets including the Gland Segmentation dataset, TCGA COAD, TCGA READ, and SPIDER.
  Results: On the Gland Segmentation dataset the framework achieved a mean Intersection over Union of 80.10 and a mean Dice coefficient of 89.10. Cross cohort evaluation demonstrated robust generalization on TCGA COAD and TCGA READ without additional annotations, while reduced performance on SPIDER reflected domain shift.
  Conclusions: The proposed framework provides an annotation efficient and generalizable approach for gland segmentation in colorectal histopathology.

</details>


### [270] [StreamReady: Learning What to Answer and When in Long Streaming Videos](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08620)
*Shehreen Azad,Vibhav Vineet,Yogesh Singh Rawat*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文提出了StreamReady框架，通过引入答案准备度评分（ARS）来解决流式视频理解中的时机敏感问题，确保模型在恰当时刻回答问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 流式视频理解需要模型在支持性视觉证据出现时准确回答，过早回答是猜测，过晚回答则失去实时效用，现有方法缺乏对回答时机的考量。

Method: 提出StreamReady框架：1) 引入答案准备度评分（ARS），包含非对称的提前和延迟惩罚；2) 设计轻量级准备度机制，判断是否观察到足够证据后再响应；3) 创建ProReady-QA基准测试，标注答案证据窗口和主动多轮问题。

Result: StreamReady在ProReady-QA上表现优异，在8个额外的流式和离线长视频基准测试中持续优于先前方法，展示了鲁棒且广泛可泛化的视频理解能力。

Conclusion: StreamReady通过整合时间推理和准时回答机制，有效解决了流式视频理解中的时机问题，为实时视频分析提供了更可靠的解决方案。

Abstract: Streaming video understanding often involves time-sensitive scenarios where models need to answer exactly when the supporting visual evidence appears: answering before the evidence reflects speculation, answering after it has passed reduces real-time utility. To capture this behavior, we introduce a readiness-aware formulation of streaming video understanding with the Answer Readiness Score (ARS), a timing-aware objective with asymmetric early and late penalties. When combined with correctness, ARS defines an effective accuracy that measures not just whether a model is right, but whether it answers at the appropriate moment. Building on this formulation, we introduce StreamReady, a framework to unify temporal reasoning with on-time answering through a lightweight readiness mechanism that decides if sufficient evidence has been observed before responding. To evaluate this capability, we further introduce ProReady-QA, a benchmark with annotated answer evidence windows and proactive multi-turn questions across local and global contexts. StreamReady achieves superior performance on ProReady-QA, and consistently outperforms prior methods across eight additional streaming and offline long-video benchmarks, demonstrating robust and broadly generalizable video understanding capability.

</details>


### [271] [UNBOX: Unveiling Black-box visual models with Natural-language](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08639)
*Simone Carnemolla,Chiara Russo,Simone Palazzo,Quentin Bouniot,Daniela Giordano,Zeynep Akata,Matteo Pennisi,Concetto Spampinato*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: UNBOX是一个在完全黑盒约束下（数据、梯度、反向传播均不可用）进行类别级模型解构的框架，利用大语言模型和文生图扩散模型将激活最大化转化为语义搜索，生成可解释的文本描述符来揭示模型的内部概念和潜在偏见。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前视觉系统多为黑盒API，隐藏了架构、参数、梯度和训练数据，导致无法进行有效审计、偏见检测和失败分析。现有解释方法需要白盒或灰盒访问权限，不适用于真实世界的黑盒部署场景。

Method: UNBOX利用大语言模型和文本到图像扩散模型，将激活最大化重新定义为纯语义搜索，仅基于输出概率生成人类可解释的文本描述符，揭示每个类别最大程度激活的概念。

Result: 在ImageNet-1K、Waterbirds和CelebA数据集上，通过语义保真度测试、视觉特征相关性分析和切片发现审计评估，UNBOX在最严格的黑盒约束下，性能与最先进的白盒可解释性方法相当。

Conclusion: 即使没有任何内部访问权限，也能恢复模型内部推理的有意义见解，使视觉识别系统更加可信和可问责，为黑盒模型的可解释性提供了新途径。

Abstract: Ensuring trustworthiness in open-world visual recognition requires models that are interpretable, fair, and robust to distribution shifts. Yet modern vision systems are increasingly deployed as proprietary black-box APIs, exposing only output probabilities and hiding architecture, parameters, gradients, and training data. This opacity prevents meaningful auditing, bias detection, and failure analysis. Existing explanation methods assume white- or gray-box access or knowledge of the training distribution, making them unusable in these real-world settings. We introduce UNBOX, a framework for class-wise model dissection under fully data-free, gradient-free, and backpropagation-free constraints. UNBOX leverages Large Language Models and text-to-image diffusion models to recast activation maximization as a purely semantic search driven by output probabilities. The method produces human-interpretable text descriptors that maximally activate each class, revealing the concepts a model has implicitly learned, the training distribution it reflects, and potential sources of bias. We evaluate UNBOX on ImageNet-1K, Waterbirds, and CelebA through semantic fidelity tests, visual-feature correlation analyses and slice-discovery auditing. Despite operating under the strictest black-box constraints, UNBOX performs competitively with state-of-the-art white-box interpretability methods. This demonstrates that meaningful insight into a model's internal reasoning can be recovered without any internal access, enabling more trustworthy and accountable visual recognition systems.

</details>


### [272] [Retrieval-Augmented Gaussian Avatars: Improving Expression Generalization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08645)
*Matan Levy,Gavriel Habib,Issar Tzachor,Dvir Samuel,Rami Ben-Ari,Nir Darshan,Or Litany,Dani Lischinski*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: RAF通过检索增强训练，提升无模板动画头模型的表达能力


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有无模板动画头模型仅从单身份数据学习表情相关变形，导致表情覆盖有限，对训练分布外的运动表现不佳

Method: 构建大型无标签表情库，训练时用最近邻检索表情替换部分主体表情特征，同时保持原始帧重建

Result: 在NeRSemble基准测试中，RAF在自驱动和跨驱动场景下均提升表情保真度

Conclusion: 检索增强训练能有效提升无模板头模型的表情多样性和鲁棒性

Abstract: Template-free animatable head avatars can achieve high visual fidelity by learning expression-dependent facial deformation directly from a subject's capture, avoiding parametric face templates and hand-designed blendshape spaces. However, since learned deformation is supervised only by the expressions observed for a single identity, these models suffer from limited expression coverage and often struggle when driven by motions that deviate from the training distribution. We introduce RAF (Retrieval-Augmented Faces), a simple training-time augmentation designed for template-free head avatars that learn deformation from data. RAF constructs a large unlabeled expression bank and, during training, replaces a subset of the subject's expression features with nearest-neighbor expressions retrieved from this bank while still reconstructing the subject's original frames. This exposes the deformation field to a broader range of expression conditions, encouraging stronger identity-expression decoupling and improving robustness to expression distribution shift without requiring paired cross-identity data, additional annotations, or architectural changes. We further analyze how retrieval augmentation increases expression diversity and validate retrieval quality with a user study showing that retrieved neighbors are perceptually closer in expression and pose. Experiments on the NeRSemble benchmark demonstrate that RAF consistently improves expression fidelity over the baseline, in both self-driving and cross-driving scenarios.

</details>


### [273] [CAST: Modeling Visual State Transitions for Consistent Video Retrieval](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08648)
*Yanqing Liu,Yingcheng Liu,Fanghong Dong,Budianto Budianto,Cihang Xie,Yan Jiao*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出一致性视频检索（CVR）任务，并开发了轻量级可插拔适配器CAST，通过状态条件残差更新来增强视频检索中的状态和身份一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着视频内容创作向长篇叙事转变，将短片段组合成连贯故事线变得日益重要。现有检索方法在推理时缺乏上下文感知，过于关注局部语义对齐而忽略了状态和身份一致性。

Method: 提出CAST（上下文感知状态转换）适配器，这是一个轻量级、即插即用的模块，兼容各种冻结的视觉-语言嵌入空间。通过从视觉历史预测状态条件残差更新（Δ），在潜在状态演化中引入显式归纳偏置。

Result: 在YouCook2和CrossTask数据集上性能提升，在COIN数据集上保持竞争力，在各种基础骨干网络上始终优于零样本基线。此外，CAST为黑盒视频生成候选（如Veo）提供了有用的重排序信号，促进更时间连贯的延续。

Conclusion: CAST通过引入状态条件残差更新的显式归纳偏置，有效解决了视频检索中的一致性问题，为长篇视频叙事创作提供了实用的解决方案。

Abstract: As video content creation shifts toward long-form narratives, composing short clips into coherent storylines becomes increasingly important. However, prevailing retrieval formulations remain context-agnostic at inference time, prioritizing local semantic alignment while neglecting state and identity consistency. To address this structural limitation, we formalize the task of Consistent Video Retrieval (CVR) and introduce a diagnostic benchmark spanning YouCook2, COIN, and CrossTask. We propose CAST (Context-Aware State Transition), a lightweight, plug-and-play adapter compatible with diverse frozen vision-language embedding spaces. By predicting a state-conditioned residual update ($Δ$) from visual history, CAST introduces an explicit inductive bias for latent state evolution. Extensive experiments show that CAST improves performance on YouCook2 and CrossTask, remains competitive on COIN, and consistently outperforms zero-shot baselines across diverse foundation backbones. Furthermore, CAST provides a useful reranking signal for black-box video generation candidates (e.g., from Veo), promoting more temporally coherent continuations.

</details>


### [274] [ImprovedGS+: A High-Performance C++/CUDA Re-Implementation Strategy for 3D Gaussian Splatting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08661)
*Jordi Muñoz Vicente*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: ImprovedGS+ 是一个基于C++/CUDA的3D高斯溅射实现，通过硬件优化内核显著降低训练延迟，在Mip-NeRF360数据集上建立了帕累托最优前沿。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 3D高斯溅射需要在重建保真度和计算效率之间取得平衡。现有方法存在主机-设备同步开销大、训练延迟高等问题，需要更高效的硬件优化实现。

Method: 从高级Python逻辑转向硬件优化的C++/CUDA内核，引入长轴分割CUDA内核、基于拉普拉斯算子的重要性内核（带非极大值抑制的边缘评分）和自适应指数尺度调度器。

Result: 1M预算变体比最先进的MCMC基线训练时间减少26.8%（节省17分钟），使用的高斯数量减少13.3%且保持视觉质量；完整变体比ADC基线PSNR提高1.28dB，参数复杂度降低38.4%。

Conclusion: ImprovedGS+在LichtFeld-Studio生态系统中实现了速度、质量和可用性的核心支柱平衡，是一个可扩展的高速解决方案。

Abstract: Recent advancements in 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) have shifted the focus toward balancing reconstruction fidelity with computational efficiency. In this work, we propose ImprovedGS+, a high-performance, low-level reinvention of the ImprovedGS strategy, implemented natively within the LichtFeld-Studio framework. By transitioning from high-level Python logic to hardware-optimized C++/CUDA kernels, we achieve a significant reduction in host-device synchronization and training latency. Our implementation introduces a Long-Axis-Split (LAS) CUDA kernel, custom Laplacian-based importance kernels with Non-Maximum Suppression (NMS) for edge scores, and an adaptive Exponential Scale Scheduler. Experimental results on the Mip-NeRF360 dataset demonstrate that ImprovedGS+ establishes a new Pareto-optimal front for scene reconstruction. Our 1M-budget variant outperforms the state-of-the-art MCMC baseline by achieving a 26.8% reduction in training time (saving 17 minutes per session) and utilizing 13.3% fewer Gaussians while maintaining superior visual quality. Furthermore, our full variant demonstrates a 1.28 dB PSNR increase over the ADC baseline with a 38.4% reduction in parametric complexity. These results validate ImprovedGS+ as a scalable, high-speed solution that upholds the core pillars of Speed, Quality, and Usability within the LichtFeld-Studio ecosystem.

</details>


### [275] [Talking Together: Synthesizing Co-Located 3D Conversations from Audio](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08674)
*Mengyi Shan,Shouchieh Chang,Ziqian Bai,Shichen Liu,Yinda Zhang,Luchuan Song,Rohit Pandey,Sean Fanello,Zeng Huang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文提出首个从混合音频流生成两个交互参与者完整3D面部动画的系统，能建模动态空间关系（相对位置、朝向、相互注视），并通过文本描述控制相对头部姿态。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法通常产生类似视频会议的孤立"说话头部"，缺乏真实面对面对话所需的动态3D空间关系建模。需要解决从混合音频生成完整交互式3D面部动画的挑战。

Method: 提出双流架构，每个流负责一个参与者的输出。使用说话者角色嵌入和说话者间交叉注意力机制分离混合音频并建模交互。引入新颖的注视损失促进自然眼神接触。构建包含200万对对话数据的大规模数据集。

Result: 方法生成流畅、可控、空间感知的双人动画，适用于VR和远程呈现应用。在感知真实性和交互连贯性方面显著优于现有基线方法。

Conclusion: 该研究首次实现了从混合音频生成完整3D交互面部动画，通过建模动态空间关系和引入注视损失，为沉浸式应用提供了更真实的对话体验。

Abstract: We tackle the challenging task of generating complete 3D facial animations for two interacting, co-located participants from a mixed audio stream. While existing methods often produce disembodied "talking heads" akin to a video conference call, our work is the first to explicitly model the dynamic 3D spatial relationship -- including relative position, orientation, and mutual gaze -- that is crucial for realistic in-person dialogues. Our system synthesizes the full performance of both individuals, including precise lip-sync, and uniquely allows their relative head poses to be controlled via textual descriptions. To achieve this, we propose a dual-stream architecture where each stream is responsible for one participant's output. We employ speaker's role embeddings and inter-speaker cross-attention mechanisms designed to disentangle the mixed audio and model the interaction. Furthermore, we introduce a novel eye gaze loss to promote natural, mutual eye contact. To power our data-hungry approach, we introduce a novel pipeline to curate a large-scale conversational dataset consisting of over 2 million dyadic pairs from in-the-wild videos. Our method generates fluid, controllable, and spatially aware dyadic animations suitable for immersive applications in VR and telepresence, significantly outperforming existing baselines in perceived realism and interaction coherence.

</details>


### [276] [ER-Pose: Rethinking Keypoint-Driven Representation Learning for Real-Time Human Pose Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08681)
*Nanjun Li,Pinqi Cheng,Zean Liu,Minghe Tian,Xuanyin Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: ER-Pose：一种关键点驱动的单阶段多人姿态估计框架，通过消除边界框预测、重新设计预测头、引入关键点驱动的动态样本分配和平滑OKS损失函数，解决了传统框驱动方法的语义冲突问题，在COCO和CrowdPose上显著提升了精度和效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统单阶段多人姿态估计方法（如YOLO-like模型）继承自目标检测的框驱动范式，其中姿态估计受边界框监督的隐式约束。这导致样本分配和特征表示的偏差，造成任务不对齐，限制了姿态估计精度。本文从关键点驱动视角重新审视框驱动的单阶段姿态估计，发现并行目标间的语义冲突是性能下降的关键原因。

Method: 提出关键点驱动学习范式：1) 移除边界框预测，重新设计预测头以更好地适应姿态估计的高维结构化表示；2) 引入关键点驱动的动态样本分配策略，使训练目标与姿态评估指标对齐，实现密集监督训练和高效无NMS推理；3) 提出平滑OKS损失函数以稳定基于回归的姿态估计优化。基于这些设计开发了ER-Pose框架。

Result: 在MS COCO和CrowdPose数据集上，ER-Pose-n相比基线YOLO-Pose，在没有预训练时分别获得3.2/6.7 AP提升，在有预训练时分别获得7.4/4.9 AP提升。这些提升是在参数更少、推理效率更高的情况下实现的。

Conclusion: 关键点驱动范式能够有效解决传统框驱动姿态估计中的语义冲突问题，提升单阶段多人姿态估计的性能和效率。ER-Pose框架通过将姿态估计提升为主要预测目标，实现了更好的任务对齐和优化稳定性。

Abstract: Single-stage multi-person pose estimation aims to jointly perform human localization and keypoint prediction within a unified framework, offering advantages in inference efficiency and architectural simplicity. Consequently, multi-scale real-time detection architectures, such as YOLO-like models, are widely adopted for real-time pose estimation. However, these approaches typically inherit a box-driven modeling paradigm from object detection, in which pose estimation is implicitly constrained by bounding-box supervision during training. This formulation introduces biases in sample assignment and feature representation, resulting in task misalignment and ultimately limiting pose estimation accuracy. In this work, we revisit box-driven single-stage pose estimation from a keypoint-driven perspective and identify semantic conflicts among parallel objectives as a key source of performance degradation. To address this issue, we propose a keypoint-driven learning paradigm that elevates pose estimation to a primary prediction objective. Specifically, we remove bounding-box prediction and redesign the prediction head to better accommodate the high-dimensional structured representations for pose estimation. We further introduce a keypoint-driven dynamic sample assignment strategy to align training objectives with pose evaluation metrics, enabling dense supervision during training and efficient NMS-free inference. In addition, we propose a smooth OKS-based loss function to stabilize optimization in regression-based pose estimation. Based on these designs, we develop a single-stage multi-person pose estimation framework, termed ER-Pose. On MS COCO and CrowdPose, ER-Pose-n achieves AP improvements of 3.2/6.7 without pre-training and 7.4/4.9 with pre-training respectively compared with the baseline YOLO-Pose. These improvements are achieved with fewer parameters and higher inference efficiency.

</details>


### [277] [HiAR: Efficient Autoregressive Long Video Generation via Hierarchical Denoising](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08703)
*Kai Zou,Dian Zheng,Hongbo Liu,Tiankai Hang,Bin Liu,Nenghai Yu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: HiAR是一种自回归扩散视频生成框架，通过分层去噪和同噪声级别条件化来解决时间连续性保持和错误累积问题，实现高质量长视频生成。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自回归扩散方法在生成长视频时面临两个主要问题：1) 需要高度去噪的上下文来保持时间连续性，但这会导致预测错误以高确定性传播，加剧质量退化；2) 错误累积会导致渐进式质量下降。作者认为高度干净的上下文并非必需，同噪声级别的条件化就能提供足够的时间一致性信号。

Method: 提出HiAR分层去噪框架：1) 反向传统生成顺序，在所有块上进行因果生成，确保每个块始终以同噪声级别的上下文为条件；2) 引入前向KL正则器，在双向注意力模式下保持运动多样性，避免自展开蒸馏中的低运动捷径问题；3) 支持流水线并行推理，加速生成过程。

Result: 在VBench测试中（20秒生成），HiAR在所有比较方法中获得了最佳总体得分和最低的时间漂移。在4步设置下，通过流水线并行推理实现了1.8倍的时钟加速。

Conclusion: HiAR证明了在自回归扩散视频生成中，同噪声级别的条件化既能提供足够的时间连续性信号，又能有效缓解错误传播。分层去噪框架不仅提高了生成质量，还通过并行化加速了推理过程，为生成长视频提供了一种有效的解决方案。

Abstract: Autoregressive (AR) diffusion offers a promising framework for generating videos of theoretically infinite length. However, a major challenge is maintaining temporal continuity while preventing the progressive quality degradation caused by error accumulation. To ensure continuity, existing methods typically condition on highly denoised contexts; yet, this practice propagates prediction errors with high certainty, thereby exacerbating degradation. In this paper, we argue that a highly clean context is unnecessary. Drawing inspiration from bidirectional diffusion models, which denoise frames at a shared noise level while maintaining coherence, we propose that conditioning on context at the same noise level as the current block provides sufficient signal for temporal consistency while effectively mitigating error propagation. Building on this insight, we propose HiAR, a hierarchical denoising framework that reverses the conventional generation order: instead of completing each block sequentially, it performs causal generation across all blocks at every denoising step, so that each block is always conditioned on context at the same noise level. This hierarchy naturally admits pipelined parallel inference, yielding a 1.8 wall-clock speedup in our 4-step setting. We further observe that self-rollout distillation under this paradigm amplifies a low-motion shortcut inherent to the mode-seeking reverse-KL objective. To counteract this, we introduce a forward-KL regulariser in bidirectional-attention mode, which preserves motion diversity for causal inference without interfering with the distillation loss. On VBench (20s generation), HiAR achieves the best overall score and the lowest temporal drift among all compared methods.

</details>


### [278] [FVG-PT: Adaptive Foreground View-Guided Prompt Tuning for Vision-Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08708)
*Haoyang Li,Liang Wang,Siyu Zhou,Jiacheng Sun,Jing Jiang,Chao Wang,Guodong Long,Yan Peng*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: FVG-PT是一种用于CLIP提示调优的即插即用前景注意力引导模块，通过前景可靠性门、前景蒸馏补偿和先验校准模块来缓解视觉编码器前景注意力的偏移问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有CLIP提示调优方法对视觉-语言模型内部注意力表示变化关注有限，预测失败模式可归因于视觉编码器前景注意力的偏移

Method: 提出FVG-PT框架，包含三个模块：1）可学习前景可靠性门自动增强前景视图质量；2）前景蒸馏补偿模块引导视觉注意力聚焦前景；3）先验校准模块缓解过度关注前景导致的泛化能力下降

Result: 在多个骨干模型和数据集上的实验证明了FVG-PT的有效性和兼容性

Conclusion: FVG-PT通过自适应引导视觉编码器的前景注意力，有效解决了提示调优中的注意力偏移问题，提升了模型性能

Abstract: CLIP-based prompt tuning enables pretrained Vision-Language Models (VLMs) to efficiently adapt to downstream tasks. Although existing studies have made significant progress, they pay limited attention to changes in the internal attention representations of VLMs during the tuning process. In this paper, we attribute the failure modes of prompt tuning predictions to shifts in foreground attention of the visual encoder, and propose Foreground View-Guided Prompt Tuning (FVG-PT), an adaptive plug-and-play foreground attention guidance module, to alleviate the shifts. Concretely, FVG-PT introduces a learnable Foreground Reliability Gate to automatically enhance the foreground view quality, applies a Foreground Distillation Compensation module to guide visual attention toward the foreground, and further introduces a Prior Calibration module to mitigate generalization degradation caused by excessive focus on the foreground. Experiments on multiple backbone models and datasets show the effectiveness and compatibility of FVG-PT. Codes are available at: https://github.com/JREion/FVG-PT

</details>


### [279] [Scale Space Diffusion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08709)
*Soumik Mukhopadhyay,Prateksha Udhayanan,Abhinav Shrivastava*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 论文提出Scale Space Diffusion，将尺度空间理论融入扩散模型，通过下采样降质而非噪声，并使用Flexi-UNet在不同分辨率下进行去噪，显著降低了计算成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩散模型通过噪声降质图像，而尺度空间理论通过低通滤波展示类似的信息层次结构。作者发现高度噪声的扩散状态包含的信息并不比小尺寸下采样图像多，因此质疑为什么必须在全分辨率下处理这些状态。

Method: 1. 将尺度空间理论融入扩散过程，提出具有广义线性降质的扩散模型族；2. 使用下采样作为降质方法，提出Scale Space Diffusion；3. 设计Flexi-UNet，一种UNet变体，能够在不同分辨率下执行保持分辨率或增加分辨率的去噪，仅使用网络必要部分。

Result: 在CelebA和ImageNet数据集上评估了Scale Space Diffusion框架，分析了其在分辨率和网络深度方面的缩放行为。结果表明该方法能够有效降低计算成本。

Conclusion: 通过将尺度空间理论融入扩散模型，提出了一种更高效的扩散框架Scale Space Diffusion，结合Flexi-UNet架构，能够在不同分辨率下智能处理图像，显著减少计算需求。

Abstract: Diffusion models degrade images through noise, and reversing this process reveals an information hierarchy across timesteps. Scale-space theory exhibits a similar hierarchy via low-pass filtering. We formalize this connection and show that highly noisy diffusion states contain no more information than small, downsampled images - raising the question of why they must be processed at full resolution. To address this, we fuse scale spaces into the diffusion process by formulating a family of diffusion models with generalized linear degradations and practical implementations. Using downsampling as the degradation yields our proposed Scale Space Diffusion. To support Scale Space Diffusion, we introduce Flexi-UNet, a UNet variant that performs resolution-preserving and resolution-increasing denoising using only the necessary parts of the network. We evaluate our framework on CelebA and ImageNet and analyze its scaling behavior across resolutions and network depths. Our project website ( https://prateksha.github.io/projects/scale-space-diffusion/ ) is available publicly.

</details>


<div id='cs.RO'></div>

# cs.RO [[Back]](#toc)

### [280] [A Pivot-Based Kirigami Utensil for Hand-Held and Robot-Assisted Feeding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06716)
*Keone Leao,Grace Brotherson,Iain Mischel,Sagar Parekh,Dylan P. Losey*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 开发了一种名为kiri-spoon的新型餐具，可作为手持工具或机器人附件使用，通过钳式设计夹取食物，减少震颤患者进食时的洒落问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 超过6000万患有特发性震颤和其他行动障碍的成年人每天面临进食困难。传统餐具难以操控，容易洒落食物，限制了他们可食用的食物种类。现有解决方案要么是刚性手持餐具效果不佳，要么是专门为机器人辅助喂食设计的软性餐具，适用范围有限。

Method: 采用基于枢轴的设计理念，类似钳子的工作原理：用户挤压手柄改变餐具形状来夹住食物。kiri-spoon既可作为勺子舀取食物，也可作为叉子夹取食物。设计包括手持版本（仅4个3D打印部件）和机器人辅助版本（添加舵机）。通过运动学或材料变化来调整开合所需的力度。

Result: 测试了开合kiri-spoon所需的力度，并展示了如何通过运动学或材料变化进行调整。用户研究表明，残疾成人和帕金森病老年患者认为kiri-spoon比现有替代品更好地满足他们的需求，提供了更有效的防洒落手段。

Conclusion: kiri-spoon为患有震颤和其他行动障碍的用户提供了一种创新的餐具解决方案，既可作为手持工具使用，也可轻松转换为机器人辅助喂食附件，提高了进食的自主性和安全性。

Abstract: Eating is a daily challenge for over 60 million adults with essential tremors and other mobility limitations. For these users, traditional utensils like forks or spoons are difficult to manipulate -- resulting in accidental spills and restricting the types of food that can be consumed. Prior work has developed rigid, hand-held utensils that often fail to secure food, as well as soft, shape-changing utensils made strictly for robot-assisted feeding. To assist a broader range of users, we introduce a re-designed kiri-spoon that can be leveraged as either a hand-held utensil or a robot-mounted attachment. Our key idea -- developed in collaboration with stakeholders -- is a pivot-based design. With this design the kiri-spoon behaves like a pair of pliers: users squeeze the handles to change the shape of the utensil and enclose food morsels. In practice, users can apply this kiri-spoon as either a spoon (that scoops food) or as a fork (that pinches food); when the handles are closed, the utensil wraps around the morsel and prevents it from accidentally falling. We characterize the amount of force required to open or close the kiri-spoon, and show how designers can modify this force through kinematic or material changes. A highlight of our design is its accessibility: the hand-held version consists of just four 3D printed parts that snap together. By adding a servo motor, we can extend this same kinematic structure to robot-assisted feeding. Across our user studies, adults with disabilities and elderly adults with Parkinson's reported that the kiri-spoon better met their needs and provided a more effective means of spill prevention than existing alternatives. See a video of our kiri-spoon here: https://youtu.be/FFIomm5RL98

</details>


### [281] [Dynamic Targeting of Satellite Observations Using Supplemental Geostationary Satellite Data and Hierarchical Planning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06719)
*Akseli Kangaslahti,Itai Zilberstein,Alberto Candela,Steve Chien*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 动态目标观测（DT）任务通过使用静止卫星数据（35分钟前瞻）和机载传感器数据（1分钟前瞻）的层次化规划方法，显著提升观测性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统DT任务面临机载前瞻传感器空间范围有限、仪器移动性、数据吞吐量和机载计算限制等挑战，需要更有效的前瞻信息来提升观测性能

Method: 提出层次化规划方法：使用静止卫星数据（35分钟前瞻）在多项式时间内制定长期观测蓝图，再利用机载传感器数据（1分钟前瞻）在短期范围内细化计划

Result: 层次化规划器比传统DT规划器性能提升高达41%，在目标稀疏分布且动态变化的场景中效果最显著

Conclusion: 结合静止卫星数据和机载传感器数据的层次化规划方法能有效解决DT任务挑战，在动态目标观测场景中显著提升科学回报

Abstract: The Dynamic Targeting (DT) mission concept is an approach to satellite observation in which a lookahead sensor gathers information about the upcoming environment and uses this information to intelligently plan observations. Previous work has shown that DT has the potential to increase the science return across applications. However, DT mission concepts must address challenges, such as the limited spatial extent of onboard lookahead data and instrument mobility, data throughput, and onboard computation constraints. In this work, we show how the performance of DT systems can be improved by using supplementary data streamed from geostationary satellites that provide lookahead information up to 35 minutes ahead of time rather than the 1 minute latency from an onboard lookahead sensor. While there is a greater volume of geostationary data, the search space for observation planning explodes exponentially with the size of the horizon. To address this, we introduce a hierarchical planning approach in which the geostationary data is used to plan a long-term observation blueprint in polynomial time, then the onboard lookahead data is leveraged to refine that plan over short-term horizons. We compare the performance of our approach to that of traditional DT planners relying on onboard lookahead data across four different problem instances: three cloud avoidance variations and a storm hunting scenario. We show that our hierarchical planner outperforms the traditional DT planners by up to 41% and examine the features of the scenarios that affect the performance of our approach. We demonstrate that incorporating geostationary satellite data is most effective for dynamic problem instances in which the targets of interest are sparsely distributed throughout the overflight.

</details>


### [282] [Robotic Foundation Models for Industrial Control: A Comprehensive Survey and Readiness Assessment Framework](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06749)
*David Kube,Simon Hadwiger,Tobias Meisen*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该调查论文对机器人基础模型（RFMs）的工业适用性进行了系统性评估，提出了包含149个具体标准的评估框架，并对324个具备操作能力的RFMs进行了评估，发现工业成熟度有限且不均衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人基础模型作为实现灵活、指令驱动的机器人控制的有前景途径正在兴起，但对其工业适用性的关键调查仍然缺乏。该研究旨在填补这一空白，分析工业领域和用例如何塑造RFMs的需求。

Method: 1. 将工业部署视角综合为11个相互依赖的影响因素；2. 将其转化为包含149个具体标准的评估框架（涵盖模型能力和生态系统需求）；3. 使用保守的LLM辅助评估管道对324个操作能力RFMs进行评估，获得48,276个标准级决策；4. 通过专家判断验证评估结果。

Result: 评估结果表明工业成熟度有限且不均衡：即使是评分最高的模型也只能满足部分标准，通常表现出特定影响因素的高峰而非综合覆盖。模型在协作机器人平台、异构传感与执行、边缘计算约束和安全关键操作等方面的工业适用性存在显著差距。

Conclusion: 实现工业级机器人基础模型的进步，较少依赖于孤立的基准测试成功，而更多依赖于将安全性、实时可行性、鲁棒感知、交互和成本效益的系统集成系统地纳入可审计的部署堆栈中。

Abstract: Robotic foundation models (RFMs) are emerging as a promising route towards flexible, instruction- and demonstration-driven robot control, however, a critical investigation of their industrial applicability is still lacking. This survey gives an extensive overview over the RFM-landscape and analyses, driven by concrete implications, how industrial domains and use cases shape the requirements of RFMs, with particular focus on collaborative robot platforms, heterogeneous sensing and actuation, edge-computing constraints, and safety-critical operation. We synthesise industrial deployment perspectives into eleven interdependent implications and operationalise them into an assessment framework comprising a catalogue of 149 concrete criteria, spanning both model capabilities and ecosystem requirements. Using this framework, we evaluate 324 manipulation-capable RFMs via 48,276 criterion-level decisions obtained via a conservative LLM-assisted evaluation pipeline, validated against expert judgements. The results indicate that industrial maturity is limited and uneven: even the highest-rated models satisfy only a fraction of criteria and typically exhibit narrow implication-specific peaks rather than integrated coverage. We conclude that progress towards industry-grade RFMs depends less on isolated benchmark successes than on systematic incorporation of safety, real-time feasibility, robust perception, interaction, and cost-effective system integration into auditable deployment stacks.

</details>


### [283] [Gradient-based Nested Co-Design of Aerodynamic Shape and Control for Winged Robots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06760)
*Daniele Affinita,Mingda Xu,Benoît Valentin Gherardi,Pascal Fua*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出基于梯度的嵌套协同设计框架，联合优化气动外形与运动规划器，用于固定翼滑翔机的复杂动态任务


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 针对需要宽飞行包线的任务，传统先确定外形再规划运动的顺序方法由于两者间的非线性相互作用而存在次优问题，需要协同设计方法克服现有方法的局限性

Method: 采用基于梯度的嵌套协同设计框架，运动规划器求解最优控制问题，气动力由神经网络代理模型确定，能够建模复杂亚音速流动条件

Result: 在固定翼滑翔机的栖息和短距着陆两个复杂动态任务上验证，优化设计相比进化基线显著提高了任务性能，且计算时间大幅减少

Conclusion: 提出的协同设计框架能够有效克服传统方法的局限性，为宽飞行包线任务的空中机器人设计提供了通用且高效的方法

Abstract: Designing aerial robots for specialized tasks, from perching to payload delivery, requires tailoring their aerodynamic shape to specific mission requirements. For tasks involving wide flight envelopes, the usual sequential process of first determining the shape and then the motion planner is likely to be suboptimal due to the inherent nonlinear interactions between them. This limitation has been motivating co-design research, which involves jointly optimizing the aerodynamic shape and the motion planner. In this paper, we present a general-purpose, gradient-based, nested co-design framework where the motion planner solves an optimal control problem and the aerodynamic forces used in the dynamics model are determined by a neural surrogate model. This enables us to model complex subsonic flow conditions encountered in aerial robotics and to overcome the limited applicability of existing co-design methods. These limitations stem from the simplifying assumptions they require for computational tractability to either the planner or the aerodynamics. We validate our method on two complex dynamic tasks for fixed-wing gliders: perching and a short landing. Our optimized designs improve task performance compared to an evolutionary baseline in a fraction of the computation time.

</details>


### [284] [Stability-Guided Exploration for Diverse Motion Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06773)
*Eckart Cobo-Briesewitz,Tilman Burghoff,Denis Shcherba,Armand Jordana,Marc Toussaint*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种基于RRT搜索与采样MPC结合的新方法，通过黑箱仿真发现多样化的长时程操作策略，无需任务特定指导。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前机器人学习依赖人类演示数据，存在数据收集成本高、任务特定性强、状态探索不足等问题。合成数据生成方法大多基于局部轨迹优化，难以发现多样化解决方案。

Method: 结合RRT风格搜索与基于采样的模型预测控制(MPC)，提出新颖的采样策略，引导探索朝向稳定配置。从稳定状态流形采样，同时通过仿真直接生长搜索树，不限制规划器仅使用稳定运动。

Result: 方法能够发现多样化的操作策略，包括推、抓、旋转、抛掷和工具使用等，适用于不同机器人形态，无需任务特定指导。

Conclusion: 该方法通过仿真中的多样化探索，解决了机器人学习中数据收集的瓶颈问题，为长时程操作任务的多样化策略发现提供了有效途径。

Abstract: Scaling up datasets is highly effective in improving the performance of deep learning models, including in the field of robot learning. However, data collection still proves to be a bottleneck. Approaches relying on collecting human demonstrations are labor-intensive and inherently limited: they tend to be narrow, task-specific, and fail to adequately explore the full space of feasible states. Synthetic data generation could remedy this, but current techniques mostly rely on local trajectory optimization and fail to find diverse solutions. In this work, we propose a novel method capable of finding diverse long-horizon manipulations through black-box simulation. We achieve this by combining an RRT-style search with sampling-based MPC, together with a novel sampling scheme that guides the exploration toward stable configurations. Specifically, we sample from a manifold of stable states while growing a search tree directly through simulation, without restricting the planner to purely stable motions. We demonstrate the method's ability to discover diverse manipulation strategies, including pushing, grasping, pivoting, throwing, and tool use, across different robot morphologies, without task-specific guidance.

</details>


### [285] [HybridMimic: Hybrid RL-Centroidal Control for Humanoid Motion Mimicking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06775)
*Ludwig Chee-Ying Tay,I-Chia Chang,Yan Gu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: HybridMimic框架通过结合基于质心的模型控制器和强化学习，让机器人动态预测连续接触状态和质心速度，提升人形机器人在分布外环境下的物理可行性和鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统强化学习框架虽然能实现灵活的运动控制，但部署时缺乏对机器人动力学的显式推理，在分布外环境中容易产生物理不可行的控制命令。现有混合方法通常依赖预定义的接触时序，限制了其通用性。

Method: 提出HybridMimic框架，其中学习策略通过预测连续接触状态和期望质心速度来动态调制基于质心模型的控制器。该架构利用质心动力的物理基础生成前馈力矩，即使在领域偏移下也能保持可行性，并通过物理信息奖励训练策略高效利用质心控制器的优化。

Result: 在Booster T1人形机器人上的硬件实验表明，HybridMimic将平均基座位置跟踪误差降低了13%，相比最先进的强化学习基线，展示了动力学感知部署的鲁棒性。

Conclusion: HybridMimic通过结合学习策略和基于质心模型的控制器，实现了对机器人动力学的显式推理，提高了人形机器人在复杂环境中的物理可行性和控制性能，特别是在分布外环境下的鲁棒性。

Abstract: Motion mimicking, i.e., encouraging the control policy to mimic human motion, facilitates the learning of complex tasks via reinforcement learning (RL) for humanoid robots. Although standard RL frameworks demonstrate impressive locomotion agility, they often bypass explicit reasoning about robot dynamics during deployment, which is a design choice that can lead to physically infeasible commands when the robot encounters out-of-distribution environments. By integrating model-based principles, hybrid approaches can improve performance; however, existing methods typically rely on predefined contact timing, limiting their versatility. This paper introduces HybridMimic, a framework in which a learned policy dynamically modulates a centroidal-model-based controller by predicting continuous contact states and desired centroidal velocities. This architecture exploits the physical grounding of centroidal dynamics to generate feedforward torques that remain feasible even under domain shift. Using physics-informed rewards, the policy is trained to efficiently utilize the centroidal controller's optimization by outputting precise control targets and reference torques. Through hardware experiments on the Booster T1 humanoid, HybridMimic reduces the average base position tracking error by 13\% compared to a state-of-the-art RL baseline, demonstrating the robustness of dynamics-aware deployment.

</details>


### [286] [A Multi-Layer Sim-to-Real Framework for Gaze-Driven Assistive Neck Exoskeletons](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06779)
*Colin Rubow,Eric Brewer,Ian Bales,Haohan Zhang,Daniel S. Brown*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文开发了一种基于VR的眼动数据训练头颈运动预测模型，并通过多层控制器选择框架筛选出两种在物理外骨骼上表现优异的注视驱动模型，证明了VR评估在开发个性化辅助机器人中的价值。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 下垂头综合征等神经疾病导致的颈部肌肉无力严重影响患者头部支撑和运动能力，造成疼痛和日常活动困难。开发能够恢复自然运动的辅助动力颈外骨骼是长期目标，但预测用户意图性头部运动仍是关键挑战。

Method: 利用虚拟现实收集健康个体的眼-头耦合运动数据，训练仅基于眼动注视预测头部运动的模型。提出新颖的多层控制器选择框架，从仿真、VR到物理颈外骨骼逐步评估头部控制策略，早期排除性能不佳的控制器。

Result: 识别出两种在物理外骨骼上表现优异的注视驱动模型。结果显示没有单一控制器被普遍偏好，强调注视驱动辅助控制中个性化的必要性。

Conclusion: 研究证明了基于VR的评估在加速开发直观、安全、个性化的辅助机器人方面的实用性，为下垂头综合征患者提供了有效的辅助解决方案。

Abstract: Dropped head syndrome, caused by neck muscle weakness from neurological diseases, severely impairs an individual's ability to support and move their head, causing pain and making everyday tasks challenging. Our long-term goal is to develop an assistive powered neck exoskeleton that restores natural movement. However, predicting a user's intended head movement remains a key challenge. We leverage virtual reality (VR) to collect coupled eye and head movement data from healthy individuals to train models capable of predicting head movement based solely on eye gaze. We also propose a novel multi-layer controller selection framework, where head control strategies are evaluated across decreasing levels of abstraction -- from simulation and VR to a physical neck exoskeleton. This pipeline effectively rejects poor-performing controllers early, identifying two novel gaze-driven models that achieve strong performance when deployed on the physical exoskeleton. Our results reveal that no single controller is universally preferred, highlighting the necessity for personalization in gaze-driven assistive control. Our work demonstrates the utility of VR-based evaluation for accelerating the development of intuitive, safe, and personalized assistive robots.

</details>


### [287] [A Comprehensive Analysis of the Effects of Network Quality of Service on Robotic Telesurgery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06824)
*Zhaomeng Zhang,Seyed Hamid Reza Roodabeh,Homa Alemzadeh*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: NetFI工具通过真实网络数据模拟不同网络条件，分析包丢失、延迟和通信丢失对远程手术任务执行的影响，发现特定运动基元对网络退化敏感，且熟练度与表现和主观工作负荷相关。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 远程手术的可行性依赖于可靠的网络服务质量，但实际网络退化对任务性能的影响尚未被充分理解。需要量化分析网络条件对手术操作的具体影响。

Method: 开发NetFI故障注入工具，基于真实网络数据建立随机QoS模型模拟不同网络条件。将NetFI集成到手术仿真平台，招募15名不同熟练度的参与者执行标准化Peg Transfer任务，在变化的包丢失、延迟和通信丢失条件下进行用户研究。分析网络QoS对整体任务性能、细粒度运动基元、客观性能安全指标和主观工作负荷感知的影响。

Result: 识别出对网络退化敏感的具体运动基元，发现熟练度、客观表现和主观工作负荷之间存在强相关性。为远程手术的操作边界提供了量化见解。

Conclusion: 开源工具和注释数据集为开发鲁棒的、网络感知的控制和缓解策略奠定了基础。研究结果有助于理解网络条件对远程手术性能的具体影响，推动更可靠的远程手术系统发展。

Abstract: The viability of long-distance telesurgery hinges on reliable network Quality of Service (QoS), yet the impact of realistic network degradations on task performance is not sufficiently understood. This paper presents a comprehensive analysis of how packet loss, delay, and communication loss affect telesurgical task execution. We introduce NetFI, a novel fault injection tool that emulates different network conditions using stochastic QoS models informed by real-world network data. By integrating NetFI with a surgical simulation platform, we conduct a user study involving 15 participants at three proficiency levels, performing a standardized Peg Transfer task under varying levels of packet loss, delay, and communication loss. We analyze the effect of network QoS on overall task performance and the fine-grained motion primitives (MPs) using objective performance and safety metrics and subjective operator's perception of workload. We identify specific MPs vulnerable to network degradation and find strong correlations between proficiency, objective performance, and subjective workload. These findings offer quantitative insights into the operational boundaries of telesurgery. Our open-source tools and annotated dataset provide a foundation for developing robust and network-aware control and mitigation strategies.

</details>


### [288] [Learning-Based Robust Control: Unifying Exploration and Distributional Robustness for Reliable Robotics via Free Energy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06831)
*Hozefa Jesawada,Giovanni Russo,Abdalla Swikir,Fares Abu-Dakka*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 基于自由能原理，提出一种联合学习环境动态和奖励的分布鲁棒策略计算方法，有效缩小仿真到现实的差距


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 可靠机器人控制的关键挑战是设计既能学习策略又能保证部署时鲁棒性的计算模型，特别是处理认知不确定性

Method: 基于计算神经科学的自由能原理，提出分布鲁棒自由能原理，修改最大扩散学习框架，联合学习环境动态和奖励

Result: 在连续控制基准测试中验证有效性，通过仿真和Franka Research 3机械臂真实实验，缩小仿真到现实差距，无需任务特定微调即可实现可重复桌面操作

Conclusion: 提出的分布鲁棒策略计算方法能有效处理认知不确定性，实现零样本部署，为可靠机器人控制提供鲁棒解决方案

Abstract: A key challenge towards reliable robotic control is devising computational models that can both learn policies and guarantee robustness when deployed in the field. Inspired by the free energy principle in computational neuroscience, to address these challenges, we propose a model for policy computation that jointly learns environment dynamics and rewards, while ensuring robustness to epistemic uncertainties. Expounding a distributionally robust free energy principle, we propose a modification to the maximum diffusion learning framework. After explicitly characterizing robustness of our policies to epistemic uncertainties in both environment and reward, we validate their effectiveness on continuous-control benchmarks, via both simulations and real-world experiments involving manipulation with a Franka Research~3 arm. Across simulation and zero-shot deployment, our approach narrows the sim-to-real gap, and enables repeatable tabletop manipulation without task-specific fine-tuning.

</details>


### [289] [Receding-Horizon Nullspace Optimization for Actuation-Aware Control Allocation in Omnidirectional UAVs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06832)
*Riccardo Pretto,Mahmoud Hamandi,Abdullah Mohamed Ali,Gokhan Alcan,Anthony Tzes,Fares Abu-Dakka*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种用于全驱动全向无人机的预测时域、执行器感知的分配策略，通过零空间优化抑制电机振荡，改善轨迹跟踪性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统控制分配方法忽略了机载执行器的不对称动态特性，这会导致电机指令振荡并在动态机动期间降低轨迹跟踪性能。

Method: 提出了一种重预测时域、执行器感知的分配策略，通过前向模拟闭环系统预测执行器引起的振荡，并通过零空间优化平滑地重新分配电机指令，同时精确保持期望的机体力矩。该方法被表述为约束最优控制问题，并通过约束迭代LQR在线求解。

Result: 在OmniOcta平台上的仿真结果表明，与传统的单步二次规划分配器相比，所提方法显著减少了电机指令振荡，从而改善了位置和姿态的轨迹跟踪性能。

Conclusion: 所提出的执行器感知分配策略通过考虑电机不对称动态并利用冗余度，能够有效抑制振荡，提高全驱动全向无人机在动态机动中的轨迹跟踪性能。

Abstract: Fully actuated omnidirectional UAVs enable independent control of forces and torques along all six degrees of freedom, broadening the operational envelope for agile flight and aerial interaction tasks. However, conventional control allocation methods neglect the asymmetric dynamics of the onboard actuators, which can induce oscillatory motor commands and degrade trajectory tracking during dynamic maneuvers. This work proposes a receding-horizon, actuation-aware allocation strategy that explicitly incorporates asymmetric motor dynamics and exploits the redundancy of over-actuated platforms through nullspace optimization. By forward-simulating the closed-loop system over a prediction horizon, the method anticipates actuator-induced oscillations and suppresses them through smooth redistribution of motor commands, while preserving the desired body wrench exactly. The approach is formulated as a constrained optimal control problem solved online via Constrained iterative LQR. Simulation results on the OmniOcta platform demonstrate that the proposed method significantly reduces motor command oscillations compared to a conventional single-step quadratic programming allocator, yielding improved trajectory tracking in both position and orientation.

</details>


### [290] [RoboCritics: Enabling Reliable End-to-End LLM Robot Programming through Expert-Informed Critics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06842)
*Callie Y. Kim,Nathan Thomas White,Evan He,Frederic Sala,Bilge Mutlu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: RoboCritics 是一个增强LLM机器人编程的系统，通过专家定义的运动级检查器来检测和修复安全问题，使代码生成更可靠透明。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前基于LLM的机器人编程方法生成不透明的"黑盒"代码，难以验证和调试，在物理系统中存在安全和可靠性风险，需要一种方法来降低编程门槛同时确保安全。

Method: 提出RoboCritics方法，在LLM编程基础上增加专家定义的运动级检查器。这些检查器分析运动执行轨迹，检测关节速度违规、碰撞、不安全末端执行器姿态等问题，提供透明反馈和一键修复，通过结构化消息与LLM迭代优化。

Result: 在18名参与者的用户研究中，相比基线LLM界面，RoboCritics减少了安全违规，提高了执行质量，改变了参与者验证和优化程序的方式，实现了更可靠的端到端机器人编程。

Conclusion: RoboCritics通过结合LLM的自然语言编程能力和专家知识，实现了更可靠、以用户为中心的机器人编程，在保持易用性的同时提高了系统安全性。

Abstract: End-user robot programming grants users the flexibility to re-task robots in situ, yet it remains challenging for novices due to the need for specialized robotics knowledge. Large Language Models (LLMs) hold the potential to lower the barrier to robot programming by enabling task specification through natural language. However, current LLM-based approaches generate opaque, "black-box" code that is difficult to verify or debug, creating tangible safety and reliability risks in physical systems. We present RoboCritics, an approach that augments LLM-based robot programming with expert-informed motion-level critics. These critics encode robotics expertise to analyze motion-level execution traces for issues such as joint speed violations, collisions, and unsafe end-effector poses. When violations are detected, critics surface transparent feedback and offer one-click fixes that forward structured messages back to the LLM, enabling iterative refinement while keeping users in the loop. We instantiated RoboCritics in a web-based interface connected to a UR3e robot and evaluated it in a between-subjects user study (n=18). Compared to a baseline LLM interface, RoboCritics reduced safety violations, improved execution quality, and shaped how participants verified and refined their programs. Our findings demonstrate that RoboCritics enables more reliable and user-centered end-to-end robot programming with LLMs.

</details>


### [291] [Nonlinear Performance Degradation of Vision-Based Teleoperation under Network Latency](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06850)
*Aws Khalil,Jaerock Kwon*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文研究了网络延迟对基于视觉的车道保持远程控制稳定性的非线性影响，发现150-225毫秒延迟会导致稳定性急剧崩溃，并开发了可复现延迟测试的LAVT框架。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 远程控制正日益成为自动驾驶汽车的关键后备方案，但网络延迟对基于视觉的感知驱动控制的影响研究不足。当前工作旨在研究网络延迟下基于摄像头的车道保持闭环稳定性的非线性退化。

Method: 开发了LAVT（延迟感知视觉远程控制测试平台），这是一个基于ROS 2的研究框架，能够进行精确的分布式单向延迟测量和可重复的延迟注入。使用LAVT在模拟环境中进行了180次闭环实验，涵盖多种道路几何形状。

Result: 研究发现，在150-225毫秒的单向感知延迟之间，稳定性出现急剧崩溃，路线完成率从100%降至50%以下，振荡不稳定性和相位滞后效应显现。控制通道的额外延迟会加剧这些效应，显著加速系统失效。

Conclusion: 通过系统性的实验表征和LAVT测试平台，本研究为感知驱动的不稳定性提供了量化见解，并为未来的延迟补偿和预测控制策略建立了可重复的基准。

Abstract: Teleoperation is increasingly being adopted as a critical fallback for autonomous vehicles. However, the impact of network latency on vision-based, perception-driven control remains insufficiently studied. The present work investigates the nonlinear degradation of closed-loop stability in camera-based lane keeping under varying network delays. To conduct this study, we developed the Latency-Aware Vision Teleoperation testbed (LAVT), a research-oriented ROS 2 framework that enables precise, distributed one-way latency measurement and reproducible delay injection. Using LAVT, we performed 180 closed-loop experiments in simulation across diverse road geometries. Our findings reveal a sharp collapse in stability between 150 ms and 225 ms of one-way perception latency, where route completion rates drop from 100% to below 50% as oscillatory instability and phase-lag effects emerge. We further demonstrate that additional control-channel delay compounds these effects, significantly accelerating system failure even under constant visual latency. By combining this systematic empirical characterization with the LAVT testbed, this work provides quantitative insights into perception-driven instability and establishes a reproducible baseline for future latency-compensation and predictive control strategies. Project page, supplementary video, and code are available at https://bimilab.github.io/paper-LAVT

</details>


### [292] [Robodimm: A Physics-Grounded Framework for Automated Actuator Sizing in Scalable Modular Robots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06864)
*J. L. Torres,M. Munoz,J. D. Alvarez,J. L. Blanco,A. Gimenez*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: Robodimm是一个用于可扩展机器人架构中自动执行器尺寸设计的软件框架，通过KKT约束逆动力学解决模块化机器人中电机-齿轮箱组合选择问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在机器人设计中，选择合适的电机-齿轮箱组合至关重要，直接影响成本、质量和动态性能。在具有闭式运动链的模块化机器人中，这个问题尤其复杂，因为关节扭矩相互耦合，执行器惯量会在机构中传播。

Method: 使用Pinocchio进行动力学计算和Pink进行逆运动学，采用Karush-Kuhn-Tucker（KKT）公式进行约束逆动力学分析。平台支持参数化缩放、通过jog模式进行交互式轨迹编程，以及考虑执行器自重效应的两轮验证工作流程。

Result: 开发了Robodimm软件框架，能够自动化执行器尺寸设计过程，特别适用于可扩展机器人架构，解决了模块化机器人中执行器选择的复杂耦合问题。

Conclusion: Robodimm提供了一个有效的工具来解决机器人设计中执行器尺寸选择的难题，特别是在具有闭式运动链的模块化机器人系统中，通过系统化的方法提高了设计效率和性能。

Abstract: Selecting an appropriate motor-gearbox combination is a critical design task in robotics because it directly affects cost, mass, and dynamic performance. This process is especially challenging in modular robots with closed kinematic chains, where joint torques are coupled and actuator inertia propagates through the mechanism. We present Robodimm, a software framework for automated actuator sizing in scalable robot architectures. By leveraging Pinocchio for dynamics and Pink for inverse kinematics, Robodimm uses a Karush-Kuhn-Tucker (KKT) formulation for constrained inverse dynamics. The platform supports parametric scaling, interactive trajectory programming through jog modes, and a two-round validation workflow that addresses actuator self-weight effects.

</details>


### [293] [CAR: Cross-Vehicle Kinodynamics Adaptation via Mobility Representation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06866)
*Tong Xu,Chenhui Pan,Xuesu Xiao*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: CAR框架通过共享的移动性潜在空间实现不同车辆平台间的快速动力学知识迁移，仅需1分钟新轨迹数据即可大幅降低预测误差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前自主越野移动系统开发存在两大问题：1）需要大量平台特定数据收集；2）使用简化的运动学模型（如独轮车或自行车模型）无法捕捉从轮式到履带式车辆等多样化平台的复杂动力学特性。这些限制阻碍了在异质自主机器人车队中的可扩展性。

Method: 提出CAR框架：使用带有自适应层归一化的Transformer编码器，将车辆轨迹转移和物理配置嵌入到共享的移动性潜在空间中。通过在该潜在空间中识别并提取最近邻的共性，实现对新平台的快速动力学适应，仅需最小数据收集和计算开销。

Result: 在基于Chrono多物理引擎的Verti-Bench模拟器上评估，并在Verti-4-Wheeler平台的四种不同物理配置上验证。仅需1分钟新轨迹数据，CAR相比直接邻居转移方法，在不同未见车辆配置上实现了高达67.2%的预测误差降低。

Conclusion: CAR框架通过共享移动性潜在空间实现跨车辆动力学知识迁移，在模拟和真实环境中均表现出有效性，为异质自主机器人车队的可扩展性提供了解决方案。

Abstract: Developing autonomous off-road mobility typically requires either extensive, platform-specific data collection or relies on simplified abstractions, such as unicycle or bicycle models, that fail to capture the complex kinodynamics of diverse platforms, ranging from wheeled to tracked vehicles. This limitation hinders scalability across evolving heterogeneous autonomous robot fleets. To address this challenge, we propose Cross-vehicle kinodynamics Adaptation via mobility Representation (CAR), a novel framework that enables rapid mobility transfer to new vehicles. CAR employs a Transformer encoder with Adaptive Layer Normalization to embed vehicle trajectory transitions and physical configurations into a shared mobility latent space. By identifying and extracting commonality from nearest neighbors within this latent space, our approach enables rapid kinodynamics adaptation to novel platforms with minimal data collection and computational overhead. We evaluate CAR using the Verti-Bench simulator, built on the Chrono multi-physics engine, and validate its performance on four distinct physical configurations of the Verti-4-Wheeler platform. With only one minute of new trajectory data, CAR achieves up to 67.2% reduction in prediction error compared to direct neighbor transfer across diverse unseen vehicle configurations, demonstrating the effectiveness of cross-vehicle mobility knowledge transfer in both simulated and real-world environments.

</details>


### [294] [Material Driven HRI Design: Aesthetics as Explainability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06879)
*Natalie Friedman,Kevin Weatherwax,Chengchao Zhu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出机器人美学设计框架，将颜色、纹理和材料作为交互信号，而非装饰，以引导用户期望和互动行为。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前机器人设计多采用光滑工业美学，隐藏机械组件，导致用户依赖外部覆盖物来定义机器人角色。这忽视了美学作为交互信号的功能，无法有效引导用户期望。

Method: 提出一个材料设计框架，将颜色、纹理和材料选择视为交互信号。通过对6个机器人进行内容分析，验证框架如何通过美学特征传达互动、任务和环境期望。

Result: 初步分析显示，美学设计能有效引导用户互动：特定材料可邀请或阻止触摸，颜色纹理可澄清机器人角色，材料选择可帮助用户预期机器人能力与环境适应性。

Conclusion: 机器人美学应被视为功能性的交互信号设计，而非单纯装饰。精心设计的美学特征能提升机器人可解释性，建立正确用户期望，避免因设计不当导致的误解。

Abstract: Aesthetics - often treated as secondary to function-guides how people interpret robots' roles. A great deal of robot designs - both real and fictitious - use sleek industrial aesthetics. These feature hard glossy plastics, hiding as much of the underlying mechanical and electrical components as possible, resembling something akin to a nude humanoid figure. This leaves robots as something of a blank slate to which end-users apply coverings to, often based on media of fiction and non-fiction alike. We argue that designers can take cues from fashion to design interaction and set appropriate expectations. Rather than viewing appearance as decoration, we propose that color, texture, and material choices function as interaction signals. These signals can invite or discourage touch, clarify a robot's role, and help align user expectations with a robot's actual capabilities. When done thoughtfully, such cues can create familiarity and legibility; when done poorly, they can lead to wrong expectations. This preliminary paper proposes a framework describing how materials can create explainability by signaling expectations for interaction, task, and environment. We use this framework to do a content analysis of 6 robots.

</details>


### [295] [VertiAdaptor: Online Kinodynamics Adaptation for Vertically Challenging Terrain](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06887)
*Tong Xu,Chenhui Pan,Aniket Datar,Xuesu Xiao*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: VertiAdaptor (VA) 是一个用于越野自动驾驶的在线适应框架，通过结合高程和语义嵌入实现地形感知的动力学建模与规划，能在新环境中快速适应。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 越野环境动态且不可预测，传统动力学模型难以泛化到不同几何和语义地形类型，需要实时适应以确保安全可靠的导航。

Method: 提出VertiAdaptor框架，通过函数编码器将高程与语义嵌入结合，学习由神经常微分方程基函数张成的动力学空间。离线训练后，通过高效的最小二乘计算在新环境中快速识别动力学特性。

Result: 在基于Chrono多物理引擎的Verti-Bench模拟器和物理Verti-4-Wheeler平台上验证，VA将预测精度提升高达23.9%，适应时间快5倍。

Conclusion: VA通过高效的地形感知动力学建模和快速适应能力，提升了自主机器人在复杂动态越野环境中的鲁棒性和可靠性。

Abstract: Autonomous driving in off-road environments presents significant challenges due to the dynamic and unpredictable nature of unstructured terrain. Traditional kinodynamic models often struggle to generalize across diverse geometric and semantic terrain types, underscoring the need for real-time adaptation to ensure safe and reliable navigation. We propose VertiAdaptor (VA), a novel online adaptation framework that efficiently integrates elevation with semantic embeddings to enable terrain-aware kinodynamic modeling and planning via function encoders. VA learns a kinodynamic space spanned by a set of neural ordinary differential equation basis functions, capturing complex vehicle-terrain interactions across varied environments. After offline training, the proposed approach can rapidly adapt to new, unseen environments by identifying kinodynamics in the learned space through a computationally efficient least-squares calculation. We evaluate VA within the Verti-Bench simulator, built on the Chrono multi-physics engine, and validate its performance both in simulation and on a physical Verti-4-Wheeler platform. Our results demonstrate that VA improves prediction accuracy by up to 23.9% and achieves a 5X faster adaptation time, advancing the robustness and reliability of autonomous robots in complex and evolving off-road environments.

</details>


### [296] [Collaborative Planning with Concurrent Synchronization for Operationally Constrained UAV-UGV Teams](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06898)
*Zihao Deng,Qianhuang Li,Peng Gao,Maggie Wigness,John Rogers,Donghyun Kim,Hao Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: CoPCS是一种基于学习的协同规划方法，通过异构图变换器编码操作约束，结合变换器解码器实现同步协同规划，使无人机和地面机器人能够协调并行执行任务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 无人机和地面机器人各有局限性：无人机覆盖快但续航短，地面机器人续航长但受地形限制。单独使用都无法完成复杂环境监测任务，需要协同规划来发挥各自优势。

Method: 提出CoPCS方法，使用异构图变换器编码操作约束，变换器解码器进行联合同步协同规划，采用端到端模仿学习训练，实现无人机和地面机器人的并行协调行动。

Result: 实验表明CoPCS实现了同步协同规划的新能力，显著提升了团队性能，在机器人仿真和实际机器人团队中都取得了良好效果。

Conclusion: CoPCS通过集成操作约束编码和同步协同规划，为异构机器人团队提供了有效的协同规划解决方案，解决了能量和地形约束下的协同任务执行问题。

Abstract: Collaborative planning under operational constraints is an essential capability for heterogeneous robot teams tackling complex large-scale real-world tasks. Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) offer rapid environmental coverage, but flight time is often limited by energy constraints, whereas Unmanned Ground Vehicles (UGVs) have greater energy capacity to support long-duration missions, but movement is constrained by traversable terrain. Individually, neither can complete tasks such as environmental monitoring. Effective UAV-UGV collaboration therefore requires energy-constrained multi-UAV task planning, traversability-constrained multi-UGV path planning, and crucially, synchronized concurrent co-planning to ensure timely in-mission recharging. To enable these capabilities, we propose Collaborative Planning with Concurrent Synchronization (CoPCS), a learning-based approach that integrates a heterogeneous graph transformer for operationally constrained task encoding with a transformer decoder for joint, synchronized co-planning that enables UAVs and UGVs to act concurrently in a coordinated manner. CoPCS is trained end-to-end under a unified imitation learning paradigm. We conducted extensive experiments to evaluate CoPCS in both robotic simulations and physical robot teams. Experimental results demonstrate that our method provides the novel multi-robot capability of synchronized concurrent co-planning and substantially improves team performance. More details of this work are available on the project website: https://hcrlab.gitlab.io/project/CoPCS.

</details>


### [297] [SysNav: Multi-Level Systematic Cooperation Enables Real-World, Cross-Embodiment Object Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06914)
*Haokun Zhu,Zongtai Li,Zihan Liu,Kevin Guo,Zhengzhi Lin,Yuxin Cai,Guofei Chen,Chen Lv,Wenshan Wang,Jean Oh,Ji Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: SysNav是一个用于真实世界物体导航的三层系统，通过解耦语义推理、导航规划和运动控制，在多种机器人平台上实现了高效可靠的跨具身部署。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 真实世界物体导航面临复杂空间结构、长时程规划和语义理解等多重挑战。虽然视觉语言模型在语义理解方面表现出色，但如何有效将其整合到真实世界导航系统中仍是一个难题。

Method: 提出SysNav三层系统：高层使用结构化场景表示和VLM提供语义导航指导；中层采用基于房间的分层导航策略，将VLM推理用于房间级决策；低层通过不同具身特定的运动控制模块执行路径点规划。

Result: 在3种机器人平台（轮式机器人、四足机器人、人形机器人）上进行了190次真实世界实验，在成功率和导航效率方面均有显著提升。在4个仿真基准测试中达到最先进性能。

Conclusion: SysNav是首个能够在复杂真实世界环境中可靠高效完成建筑尺度长距离物体导航的系统，实现了跨具身部署的鲁棒性和通用性。

Abstract: Object navigation (ObjectNav) in real-world environments is a complex problem that requires simultaneously addressing multiple challenges, including complex spatial structure, long-horizon planning and semantic understanding. Recent advances in Vision-Language Models (VLMs) offer promising capabilities for semantic understanding, yet effectively integrating them into real-world navigation systems remains a non-trivial challenge. In this work, we formulate real-world ObjectNav as a system-level problem and introduce SysNav, a three-level ObjectNav system designed for real-world crossembodiment deployment. SysNav decouples semantic reasoning, navigation planning and motion control to ensure robustness and generalizability.
