*Zhiyuan Zhang,Aditya Mohan,Seungho Han,Wan Shou,Dongyi Wang,Yu She*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出EquiBim框架，通过强制双对称等变性来提升双臂机器人模仿学习的性能和鲁棒性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机器人学习方法未充分考虑机器人系统的物理对称性，导致在对称观测下产生不对称或不一致的行为，这在双臂操作中尤为明显

Method: 将物理对称性表述为观测和动作空间上的群作用，在训练中对策略预测施加等变性约束，框架与模型无关，可集成到多种模仿学习流程中

Result: 在仿真和真实双臂系统上的实验表明，该方法能持续提升性能和分布偏移下的鲁棒性

Conclusion: 显式强制物理对称性为双臂机器人学习提供了简单而有效的归纳偏置

Abstract: Robotic imitation learning has achieved impressive success in learning complex manipulation behaviors from demonstrations. However, many existing robot learning methods do not explicitly account for the physical symmetries of robotic systems, often resulting in asymmetric or inconsistent behaviors under symmetric observations. This limitation is particularly pronounced in dual-arm manipulation, where bilateral symmetry is inherent to both the robot morphology and the structure of many tasks. In this paper, we introduce EquiBim, a symmetry-equivariant policy learning framework for bimanual manipulation that enforces bilateral equivariance between observations and actions during training. Our approach formulates physical symmetry as a group action on both observation and action spaces, and imposes an equivariance constraint on policy predictions under symmetric transformations. The framework is model-agnostic and can be seamlessly integrated into a wide range of imitation learning pipelines with diverse observation modalities and action representations, including point cloud-based and image-based policies, as well as both end-effector-space and joint-space parameterizations. We evaluate EquiBim on RoboTwin, a dual-arm robotic platform with symmetric kinematics, and evaluate it across diverse observation and action configurations in simulation. We further validate the approach on a real-world dual-arm system. Across both simulation and physical experiments, our method consistently improves performance and robustness under distribution shifts. These results suggest that explicitly enforcing physical symmetry provides a simple yet effective inductive bias for bimanual robot learning.

</details>


### [410] [The Neural Compass: Probabilistic Relative Feature Fields for Robotic Search](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08544)
*Gabriele Somaschini,Adrian Röfer,Abhinav Valada*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: ProReFF：一种从无标注数据中学习物体共现关系的特征场模型，通过预测预训练视觉语言模型的特征相对分布，用于指导物体搜索任务


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前物体共现关系通常从显式标注数据或语言模型中获取，但尚不清楚这些关系是否能仅从无标注观察中隐式学习

Method: 提出ProReFF特征场模型，预测预训练视觉语言模型的特征相对分布；引入基于学习的对齐策略处理无标注且可能矛盾的数据；设计利用预测特征分布作为语义先验指导探索的搜索代理

Result: ProReFF能捕捉自然场景中有意义的相对特征分布；在Matterport3D模拟器的100个挑战中，提出的搜索代理比最强基线效率提高20%，达到人类性能的80%

Conclusion: ProReFF成功从无标注数据中学习物体共现关系，其对齐策略有效处理观察不一致性，基于此的搜索代理在物体搜索任务中显著优于基线并接近人类水平

Abstract: Object co-occurrences provide a key cue for finding objects successfully and efficiently in unfamiliar environments. Typically, one looks for cups in kitchens and views fridges as evidence of being in a kitchen. Such priors have also been exploited in artificial agents, but they are typically learned from explicitly labeled data or queried from language models. It is still unclear whether these relations can be learned implicitly from unlabeled observations alone. In this work, we address this problem and propose ProReFF, a feature field model trained to predict relative distributions of features obtained from pre-trained vision language models. In addition, we introduce a learning-based strategy that enables training from unlabeled and potentially contradictory data by aligning inconsistent observations into a coherent relative distribution. For the downstream object search task, we propose an agent that leverages predicted feature distributions as a semantic prior to guide exploration toward regions with a high likelihood of containing the object. We present extensive evaluations demonstrating that ProReFF captures meaningful relative feature distributions in natural scenes and provides insight into the impact of our proposed alignment step. We further evaluate the performance of our search agent in 100 challenges in the Matterport3D simulator, comparing with feature-based baselines and human participants. The proposed agent is 20% more efficient than the strongest baseline and achieves up to 80% of human performance.

</details>


### [411] [Interactive World Simulator for Robot Policy Training and Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08546)
*Yixuan Wang,Rhythm Syed,Fangyu Wu,Mengchao Zhang,Aykut Onol,Jose Barreiros,Hooshang Nayyeri,Tony Dear,Huan Zhang,Yunzhu Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了Interactive World Simulator，一种基于一致性模型构建交互式世界模型的框架，能够实现快速稳定的物理交互仿真，支持超过10分钟的长时间交互，用于机器人策略训练和评估。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的动作条件视频预测模型（世界模型）通常速度慢且难以在长时间范围内保持物理一致性，限制了其在可扩展机器人策略训练和评估中的应用。

Method: 提出Interactive World Simulator框架，利用一致性模型进行图像解码和潜在空间动态预测，从中等规模机器人交互数据集中构建交互式世界模型，实现快速稳定的物理交互仿真。

Result: 学习到的世界模型能够生成交互一致的像素级预测，在单块RTX 4090 GPU上以15 FPS支持超过10分钟的稳定长时间交互。在世界模型中训练的模仿策略性能与在同等数量真实数据上训练的相当，且模拟性能与真实世界性能强相关。

Conclusion: Interactive World Simulator作为一个稳定且物理一致的替代方案，能够实现可扩展的机器人数据生成和可靠的策略评估，为机器人学习提供了有效的仿真环境。

Abstract: Action-conditioned video prediction models (often referred to as world models) have shown strong potential for robotics applications, but existing approaches are often slow and struggle to capture physically consistent interactions over long horizons, limiting their usefulness for scalable robot policy training and evaluation. We present Interactive World Simulator, a framework for building interactive world models from a moderate-sized robot interaction dataset. Our approach leverages consistency models for both image decoding and latent-space dynamics prediction, enabling fast and stable simulation of physical interactions. In our experiments, the learned world models produce interaction-consistent pixel-level predictions and support stable long-horizon interactions for more than 10 minutes at 15 FPS on a single RTX 4090 GPU. Our framework enables scalable demonstration collection solely within the world models to train state-of-the-art imitation policies. Through extensive real-world evaluation across diverse tasks involving rigid objects, deformable objects, object piles, and their interactions, we find that policies trained on world-model-generated data perform comparably to those trained on the same amount of real-world data. Additionally, we evaluate policies both within the world models and in the real world across diverse tasks, and observe a strong correlation between simulated and real-world performance. Together, these results establish the Interactive World Simulator as a stable and physically consistent surrogate for scalable robotic data generation and faithful, reproducible policy evaluation.

</details>


### [412] [CONTACT: CONtact-aware TACTile Learning for Robotic Disassembly](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08560)
*Yosuke Saka,Jyun-Chi Hu,Adeesh Desai,Zhiyuan Zhang,Bihao Zhang,Quan Khanh Luu,Md Rakibul Islam Prince,Minghui Zheng,Yu She*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文通过仿真和真实实验，系统地研究了触觉传感在机器人拆卸任务中的作用，发现触觉力场（TacFF）在接触密集和变形场景中表现最佳。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人拆卸涉及接触密集的交互，成功操作不仅依赖于几何对齐，还依赖于力相关的状态转换。基于视觉的策略在结构化环境中表现良好，但在公差小、接触主导或可变形场景中可靠性下降。因此需要研究触觉传感在机器人拆卸中的作用。

Method: 构建了五个刚性体拆卸任务的仿真环境，难度递增；设计了五个真实世界任务（三个刚性、两个可变形场景）。在统一学习框架中比较了三种传感配置：仅视觉、视觉+触觉RGB（TacRGB）、视觉+触觉力场（TacFF）。

Result: 在仿真和真实实验中，基于TacFF的策略始终获得最高的成功率，在接触依赖和可变形场景中提升尤其显著。TacRGB和TacFF的简单融合效果不如单独使用任一模态，表明简单拼接会稀释任务相关的力信息。

Conclusion: 触觉传感在机器人拆卸中起着关键的、任务依赖的作用，结构化力场表示在接触主导场景中特别有效。

Abstract: Robotic disassembly involves contact-rich interactions in which successful manipulation depends not only on geometric alignment but also on force-dependent state transitions. While vision-based policies perform well in structured settings, their reliability often degrades in tight-tolerance, contact-dominated, or deformable scenarios. In this work, we systematically investigate the role of tactile sensing in robotic disassembly through both simulation and real-world experiments. We construct five rigid-body disassembly tasks in simulation with increasing geometric constraints and extraction difficulty. We further design five real-world tasks, including three rigid and two deformable scenarios, to evaluate contact-dependent manipulation. Within a unified learning framework, we compare three sensing configurations: Vision Only, Vision + tactile RGB (TacRGB), and Vision + tactile force field (TacFF). Across both simulation and real-world experiments, TacFF-based policies consistently achieve the highest success rates, with particularly notable gains in contact-dependent and deformable settings. Notably, naive fusion of TacRGB and TacFF underperforms either modality alone, indicating that simple concatenation can dilute task-relevant force information. Our results show that tactile sensing plays a critical, task-dependent role in robotic disassembly, with structured force-field representations being particularly effective in contact-dominated scenarios.

</details>


### [413] [MetaWorld-X: Hierarchical World Modeling via VLM-Orchestrated Experts for Humanoid Loco-Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08572)
*Yutong Shen,Hangxu Liu,Penghui Liu,Jiashuo Luo,Yongkang Zhang,Rex Morvley,Chen Jiang,Jianwei Zhang,Lei Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: MetaWorld-X：基于分层世界模型的人形机器人控制框架，通过专家策略分解和VLM引导的路由机制，解决全身控制中自然性、稳定性和组合泛化问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有强化学习方法通常使用单一整体策略学习多技能，导致技能间梯度干扰和运动模式冲突，产生不自然运动、稳定性差、对复杂任务组合泛化能力不足的问题。

Method: 提出分层世界模型框架：1）将复杂控制问题分解为多个专家策略，每个专家通过模仿约束强化学习在人体运动先验下训练；2）开发智能路由机制，由视觉语言模型监督，根据高级任务语义动态组合专家策略。

Result: 该方法能够生成更自然、稳定的运动，实现组合泛化，在复杂多阶段移动操作任务中实现自适应执行。

Conclusion: MetaWorld-X通过专家策略分解和语义驱动的路由机制，有效解决了人形机器人全身控制中的自然性、稳定性和组合泛化挑战，为复杂移动操作任务提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Learning natural, stable, and compositionally generalizable whole-body control policies for humanoid robots performing simultaneous locomotion and manipulation (loco-manipulation) remains a fundamental challenge in robotics. Existing reinforcement learning approaches typically rely on a single monolithic policy to acquire multiple skills, which often leads to cross-skill gradient interference and motion pattern conflicts in high-degree-of-freedom systems. As a result, generated behaviors frequently exhibit unnatural movements, limited stability, and poor generalization to complex task compositions. To address these limitations, we propose MetaWorld-X, a hierarchical world model framework for humanoid control. Guided by a divide-and-conquer principle, our method decomposes complex control problems into a set of specialized expert policies (Specialized Expert Policies, SEP). Each expert is trained under human motion priors through imitation-constrained reinforcement learning, introducing biomechanically consistent inductive biases that ensure natural and physically plausible motion generation. Building upon this foundation, we further develop an Intelligent Routing Mechanism (IRM) supervised by a Vision-Language Model (VLM), enabling semantic-driven expert composition. The VLM-guided router dynamically integrates expert policies according to high-level task semantics, facilitating compositional generalization and adaptive execution in multi-stage loco-manipulation tasks.

</details>


### [414] [Bilevel Planning with Learned Symbolic Abstractions from Interaction Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08599)
*Fatih Dogangun,Burcu Kilic,Serdar Bahar,Emre Ugur*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出双层神经符号框架，结合概率符号规则快速生成高层候选计划，并通过连续效果模型验证计划，在需要时进行低层前向搜索，以解决传统符号方法在连续动态环境中的局限性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法依赖确定性符号域，缺乏验证机制，且仅在抽象层面操作，无法充分捕捉环境的连续动态特性，导致在复杂环境中的规划效果受限。

Method: 提出双层神经符号框架：高层使用学习的概率符号规则快速生成候选计划；低层使用学习的连续效果模型验证这些计划，必要时执行前向搜索。

Result: 在多物体操纵任务实验中，该方法优于纯符号方法，能可靠识别失败计划，规划性能与连续前向搜索相当，同时通过高效符号推理解决大多数问题。

Conclusion: 双层神经符号框架有效整合了符号推理的效率和连续动态的准确性，为复杂环境中的智能规划提供了更可靠的解决方案。

Abstract: Intelligent agents must reason over both continuous dynamics and discrete representations to generate effective plans in complex environments. Previous studies have shown that symbolic abstractions can emerge from neural effect predictors trained with a robot's unsupervised exploration. However, these methods rely on deterministic symbolic domains, lack mechanisms to verify the generated symbolic plans, and operate only at the abstract level, often failing to capture the continuous dynamics of the environment. To overcome these limitations, we propose a bilevel neuro-symbolic framework in which learned probabilistic symbolic rules generate candidate plans rapidly at the high level, and learned continuous effect models verify these plans and perform forward search when necessary at the low level. Our experiments on multi-object manipulation tasks demonstrate that the proposed bilevel method outperforms symbolic-only approaches, reliably identifying failing plans through verification, and achieves planning performance statistically comparable to continuous forward search while resolving most problems via efficient symbolic reasoning.

</details>


### [415] [Diff-Muscle: Efficient Learning for Musculoskeletal Robotic Table Tennis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08617)
*Wentao Zhao,Jun Guo,Kangyao Huang,Xin Liu,Huaping Liu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: Diff-Muscle：一种基于微分平坦性的肌肉骨骼机器人控制算法，通过将策略学习从冗余的肌肉激活空间重新表述到低维关节空间，结合分层强化学习框架，在动态乒乓球任务中实现高性能控制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 肌肉骨骼机器人在灵活性和灵巧性方面具有优势，但目前研究局限于简单任务，难以充分发挥其多段协调潜力。高维动作空间和过驱动结构导致高效学习面临挑战，需要解决这些限制以探索其全部潜力。

Method: 提出Diff-Muscle算法，利用微分平坦性将策略学习从冗余的肌肉激活空间重新表述到低维关节空间。采用分层强化学习框架，将基于运动学的肌肉驱动控制器（K-MAC）与高层轨迹规划相结合，实现灵巧精确的连续击球。

Result: 实验结果表明，Diff-Muscle在成功率方面显著优于现有基线方法，同时保持最低的肌肉激活。该框架成功实现了肌肉骨骼机器人在具有挑战性的双机器人设置中的连续击球。

Conclusion: Diff-Muscle通过微分平坦性有效解决了肌肉骨骼机器人控制中的高维度和过驱动问题，在动态乒乓球任务中展示了优越性能，为探索肌肉骨骼机器人的全部潜力提供了有效途径。

Abstract: Musculoskeletal robots provide superior advantages in flexibility and dexterity, positioning them as a promising frontier towards embodied intelligence. However, current research is largely confined to relative simple tasks, restricting the exploration of their full potential in multi-segment coordination. Furthermore, efficient learning remains a challenge, primarily due to the high-dimensional action space and inherent overactuated structures. To address these challenges, we propose Diff-Muscle, a musculoskeletal robot control algorithm that leverages differential flatness to reformulate policy learning from the redundant muscle-activation space into a significantly lower-dimensional joint space. Furthermore, we utilize the highly dynamic robotic table tennis task to evaluate our algorithm. Specifically, we propose a hierarchical reinforcement learning framework that integrates a Kinematics-based Muscle Actuation Controller (K-MAC) with high-level trajectory planning, enabling a musculoskeletal robot to perform dexterous and precise rallies. Experimental results demonstrate that Diff-Muscle significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in success rates while maintaining minimal muscle activation. Notably, the proposed framework successfully enables the musculoskeletal robots to achieve continuous rallies in a challenging dual-robot setting.

</details>


### [416] [Embedding Classical Balance Control Principles in Reinforcement Learning for Humanoid Recovery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08619)
*Nehar Poddar,Stephen McCrory,Luigi Penco,Geoffrey Clark,Hakki Erhan Svil,Robert Griffin*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种将经典平衡指标嵌入强化学习框架的统一策略，用于人形机器人从各种跌倒状态中自主恢复，实现了93.4%的恢复成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人形机器人在非结构化环境中容易跌倒且难以自主恢复，限制了其实际应用。现有强化学习方法将恢复视为纯任务奖励问题，缺乏对平衡状态的显式表示，这限制了恢复性能。

Method: 提出统一的RL策略，将经典平衡指标（捕获点、质心状态、质心动量）作为特权批评器输入和塑形奖励，在训练中直接围绕这些量进行优化。执行器仅依赖本体感觉实现零样本硬件迁移。不依赖参考轨迹或脚本化接触，单个策略覆盖完整恢复谱系。

Result: 在Unitree H1-2上训练的策略在随机初始姿势和非脚本化跌倒配置中达到93.4%的恢复率。消融研究表明移除平衡感知结构会导致完全失败。模拟到模拟迁移和初步硬件实验展示了跨环境泛化能力。

Conclusion: 将可解释的平衡结构嵌入学习框架显著减少了故障状态时间，拓宽了自主恢复的范围，为人形机器人的鲁棒性提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Humanoid robots remain vulnerable to falls and unrecoverable failure states, limiting their practical utility in unstructured environments. While reinforcement learning has demonstrated stand-up behaviors, existing approaches treat recovery as a pure task-reward problem without an explicit representation of the balance state. We present a unified RL policy that addresses this limitation by embedding classical balance metrics: capture point, center-of-mass state, and centroidal momentum, as privileged critic inputs and shaping rewards directly around these quantities during training, while the actor relies solely on proprioception for zero-shot hardware transfer. Without reference trajectories or scripted contacts, a single policy spans the full recovery spectrum: ankle and hip strategies for small disturbances, corrective stepping under large pushes, and compliant falling with multi-contact stand-up using the hands, elbows, and knees. Trained on the Unitree H1-2 in Isaac Lab, the policy achieves a 93.4% recovery rate across randomized initial poses and unscripted fall configurations. An ablation study shows that removing the balance-informed structure causes stand-up learning to fail entirely, confirming that these metrics provide a meaningful learning signal rather than incidental structure. Sim-to-sim transfer to MuJoCo and preliminary hardware experiments further demonstrate cross-environment generalization. These results show that embedding interpretable balance structure into the learning framework substantially reduces time spent in failure states and broadens the envelope of autonomous recovery.

</details>


### [417] [Exp-Force: Experience-Conditioned Pre-Grasp Force Selection with Vision-Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08668)
*Siqi Shang,Minchao Huang,Bill Fan,Lillian Chin*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: Exp-Force：基于经验条件化的框架，通过单张RGB图像预测最小可行抓取力，无需分析接触模型或手动设计启发式规则


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 准确预接触抓取力选择对机器人安全可靠操作至关重要。自适应控制器在接触后调节力但仍需要合理的初始估计。力过小需要反应调整，力过大则可能损坏易碎物体。这一权衡对于柔性夹持器尤其困难，其接触力学难以用分析模型描述。

Method: 提出Exp-Force经验条件化框架，从单张RGB图像预测最小可行抓取力。方法检索少量相关先前的抓取经验，并在这些示例上条件化视觉语言模型进行上下文推理，无需分析接触模型或手动设计启发式规则。

Result: 在129个物体实例上，Exp-Force最佳情况下的MAE为0.43N，比零样本推理减少72%误差。在30个未见物体的真实世界测试中，适当力选择率从63%提高到87%。

Conclusion: 结果表明，Exp-Force通过利用先前的交互经验，实现了可靠且可泛化的预抓取力选择。

Abstract: Accurate pre-contact grasp force selection is critical for safe and reliable robotic manipulation. Adaptive controllers regulate force after contact but still require a reasonable initial estimate. Starting a grasp with too little force requires reactive adjustment, while starting a grasp with too high a force risks damaging fragile objects. This trade-off is particularly challenging for compliant grippers, whose contact mechanics are difficult to model analytically. We propose Exp-Force, an experience-conditioned framework that predicts the minimum feasible grasping force from a single RGB image. The method retrieves a small set of relevant prior grasping experiences and conditions a vision-language model on these examples for in-context inference, without analytic contact models or manually designed heuristics. On 129 object instances, ExpForce achieves a best-case MAE of 0.43 N, reducing error by 72% over zero-shot inference. In real-world tests on 30 unseen objects, it improves appropriate force selection rate from 63% to 87%. These results demonstrate that Exp-Force enables reliable and generalizable pre-grasp force selection by leveraging prior interaction experiences. http://expforcesubmission.github.io/Exp-Force-Website/

</details>


<div id='cs.LG'></div>

# cs.LG [[Back]](#toc)

### [418] [vLLM Hook v0: A Plug-in for Programming Model Internals on vLLM](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06588)
*Ching-Yun Ko,Pin-Yu Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: vLLM Hook是一个开源插件，用于增强vLLM推理引擎的可编程性，支持被动和主动编程内部状态，实现对抗提示检测、增强RAG和激活引导等应用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前vLLM实现限制了部署模型内部状态的可编程性，阻碍了流行的测试时模型对齐和增强方法的应用，如基于注意力模式的对抗提示检测或基于激活引导的模型响应调整。

Method: vLLM Hook通过配置文件指定要捕获的内部状态，提供与vLLM的无缝集成，支持两种核心功能：被动编程（探测选定的内部状态进行分析而不影响模型生成）和主动编程（通过修改选定的内部状态来干预模型生成）。

Result: vLLM Hook展示了三个用例：提示注入检测、增强检索增强生成（RAG）和激活引导，为社区提供了改进模型推理和安全的工具。

Conclusion: vLLM Hook填补了vLLM在内部状态可编程性方面的关键空白，使研究人员和开发者能够实现更高级的模型对齐和增强技术，欢迎社区贡献以进一步完善该工具。

Abstract: Modern artificial intelligence (AI) models are deployed on inference engines to optimize runtime efficiency and resource allocation, particularly for transformer-based large language models (LLMs). The vLLM project is a major open-source library to support model serving and inference. However, the current implementation of vLLM limits programmability of the internal states of deployed models. This prevents the use of popular test-time model alignment and enhancement methods. For example, it prevents the detection of adversarial prompts based on attention patterns or the adjustment of model responses based on activation steering. To bridge this critical gap, we present vLLM Hook, an opensource plug-in to enable the programming of internal states for vLLM models. Based on a configuration file specifying which internal states to capture, vLLM Hook provides seamless integration to vLLM and supports two essential features: passive programming and active programming. For passive programming, vLLM Hook probes the selected internal states for subsequent analysis, while keeping the model generation intact. For active programming, vLLM Hook enables efficient intervention of model generation by altering the selected internal states. In addition to presenting the core functions of vLLM Hook, in version 0, we demonstrate 3 use cases including prompt injection detection, enhanced retrieval-augmented retrieval (RAG), and activation steering. Finally, we welcome the community's contribution to improve vLLM Hook via https://github.com/ibm/vllm-hook.

</details>


### [419] [How Attention Sinks Emerge in Large Language Models: An Interpretability Perspective](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06591)
*Runyu Peng,Ruixiao Li,Mingshu Chen,Yunhua Zhou,Qipeng Guo,Xipeng Qiu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文研究了LLMs中注意力汇聚现象，特别是输入序列第一个token的注意力汇聚机制，提出了P0汇聚电路的概念，并分析了其在训练过程中的形成规律。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型经常对特定token分配不成比例的注意力，这种现象被称为注意力汇聚。虽然通常认为这种汇聚是有害的，但研究发现模型对输入序列第一个token的持续关注是一个例外。然而，这种注意力汇聚的形成机制和持续原因仍不清楚，需要深入理解。

Method: 1. 追踪输入序列第一个token周围注意力汇聚的形成过程；2. 提出P0汇聚电路机制，该机制使模型能够在两个transformer块内识别位置零的token并诱导注意力汇聚，无需依赖任何语义信息；3. 通过分析30B A3B MoE模型从头训练的训练轨迹，研究该机制在训练过程中的发展规律。

Result: 1. 识别出P0汇聚电路机制，该机制解释了位置零注意力汇聚的基础；2. 发现该机制在训练早期就出现，并逐渐集中在前两层，表明这可能作为追踪预训练收敛状态的信号。

Conclusion: 该研究揭示了LLMs中注意力汇聚的简单机制，特别是输入序列第一个token的汇聚现象。P0汇聚电路的发现不仅解释了注意力汇聚的形成机制，而且其在训练过程中的发展规律可能为监测模型训练状态提供新的信号指标。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) often allocate disproportionate attention to specific tokens, a phenomenon commonly referred to as the attention sink. While such sinks are generally considered detrimental, prior studies have identified a notable exception: the model's consistent emphasis on the first token of the input sequence. This structural bias can influence a wide range of downstream applications and warrants careful consideration. Despite its prevalence, the precise mechanisms underlying the emergence and persistence of attention sinks remain poorly understood. In this work, we trace the formation of attention sinks around the first token of the input. We identify a simple mechanism, referred to as the P0 Sink Circuit, that enables the model to recognize token at position zero and induce an attention sink within two transformer blocks, without relying on any semantic information. This mechanism serves as the basis for the attention sink on position zero. Furthermore, by analyzing training traces from a 30B A3B MoE model trained from scratch, we find that this mechanism emerges early in training and becomes increasingly concentrated in the first two layers, suggesting a possible signal for tracking pre training convergence states.

</details>


### [420] [FuzzingRL: Reinforcement Fuzz-Testing for Revealing VLM Failures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06600)
*Jiajun Xu,Jiageng Mao,Ang Qi,Weiduo Yuan,Alexander Romanus,Helen Xia,Vitor Campagnolo Guizilini,Yue Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种通过模糊测试和强化学习微调自动生成问题的方法，故意诱导视觉语言模型产生错误回答，从而揭示模型漏洞


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 视觉语言模型容易出错，识别这些错误发生的位置对于确保AI系统的可靠性和安全性至关重要

Method: 通过视觉和语言模糊测试将单个输入查询转换为大量多样化变体，然后基于模糊测试结果，通过对抗性强化微调指导问题生成器产生更具挑战性的查询来触发模型失败

Result: 该方法能持续降低目标VLM的答案准确率（例如Qwen2.5-VL-32B的准确率从86.58%降至65.53%），且针对单个目标VLM训练的模糊策略能迁移到其他VLM，产生同样能降低其性能的挑战性查询

Conclusion: 提出的方法能有效揭示视觉语言模型的漏洞，通过自动生成对抗性查询来评估和提升模型的鲁棒性

Abstract: Vision Language Models (VLMs) are prone to errors, and identifying where these errors occur is critical for ensuring the reliability and safety of AI systems. In this paper, we propose an approach that automatically generates questions designed to deliberately induce incorrect responses from VLMs, thereby revealing their vulnerabilities. The core of this approach lies in fuzz testing and reinforcement finetuning: we transform a single input query into a large set of diverse variants through vision and language fuzzing. Based on the fuzzing outcomes, the question generator is further instructed by adversarial reinforcement fine-tuning to produce increasingly challenging queries that trigger model failures. With this approach, we can consistently drive down a target VLM's answer accuracy -- for example, the accuracy of Qwen2.5-VL-32B on our generated questions drops from 86.58\% to 65.53\% in four RL iterations. Moreover, a fuzzing policy trained against a single target VLM transfers to multiple other VLMs, producing challenging queries that degrade their performance as well.

</details>


### [421] [Switchable Activation Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06601)
*Laha Ale,Ning Zhang,Scott A. King,Pingzhi Fan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SWAN引入可切换激活网络，为每个神经单元配备确定性、输入依赖的二进制门，实现自适应计算分配，减少冗余同时保持精度，统一了稀疏性、剪枝和自适应推理的优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度神经网络和大规模生成模型虽然性能优异，但计算成本过高阻碍了在资源受限环境中的部署。现有的效率技术（如dropout、剪枝、低秩分解）只能提供部分解决方案，要么只影响训练过程，要么将模型压缩为静态形式，缺乏适应性。

Method: 为每个神经单元配备一个确定性、输入依赖的二进制门，使网络能够学习单元何时应该激活或非激活。这种动态控制机制自适应地分配计算，减少冗余同时保持精度。与传统的剪枝不同，SWAN不只是在训练后缩小网络，而是学习结构化的、上下文依赖的激活模式。

Result: SWAN支持高效的动态推理，并可转换为紧凑的密集模型进行部署。通过将效率问题重构为学习激活控制，SWAN统一了稀疏性、剪枝和自适应推理的优势，在减少计算成本的同时保持模型性能。

Conclusion: SWAN提出了一种新的神经计算范式，其中激活不是固定的而是上下文依赖的，这为可持续AI、边缘智能和未来受生物大脑适应性启发的架构指明了方向。

Abstract: Deep neural networks, and more recently large-scale generative models such as large language models (LLMs) and large vision-action models (LVAs), achieve remarkable performance across diverse domains, yet their prohibitive computational cost hinders deployment in resource-constrained environments. Existing efficiency techniques offer only partial remedies: dropout improves regularization during training but leaves inference unchanged, while pruning and low-rank factorization compress models post hoc into static forms with limited adaptability. Here we introduce SWAN (Switchable Activation Networks), a framework that equips each neural unit with a deterministic, input-dependent binary gate, enabling the network to learn when a unit should be active or inactive. This dynamic control mechanism allocates computation adaptively, reducing redundancy while preserving accuracy. Unlike traditional pruning, SWAN does not simply shrink networks after training; instead, it learns structured, context-dependent activation patterns that support both efficient dynamic inference and conversion into compact dense models for deployment. By reframing efficiency as a problem of learned activation control, SWAN unifies the strengths of sparsity, pruning, and adaptive inference within a single paradigm. Beyond computational gains, this perspective suggests a more general principle of neural computation, where activation is not fixed but context-dependent, pointing toward sustainable AI, edge intelligence, and future architectures inspired by the adaptability of biological brains.

</details>


### [422] [Khatri-Rao Clustering for Data Summarization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06602)
*Martino Ciaperoni,Collin Leiber,Aristides Gionis,Heikki Mannila*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出Khatri-Rao聚类范式，通过假设质心来自两个或多个简洁原型质心集的交互作用，扩展传统基于质心的聚类方法，以生成更简洁但同样准确的数据摘要。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着数据集规模和复杂度的增长，寻找简洁而准确的数据摘要成为关键挑战。传统的基于质心的聚类方法虽然广泛采用，但其生成的数据摘要常包含冗余，特别是在具有大量潜在簇的数据集中效果有限。

Method: 提出Khatri-Rao聚类范式，将传统基于质心的聚类扩展为假设质心来自两个或多个简洁原型质心集的交互作用。具体引入两种算法：Khatri-Rao k-Means算法和Khatri-Rao深度聚类框架。

Result: 实验表明，Khatri-Rao k-Means在数据摘要的简洁性和准确性之间取得了比标准k-Means更优的平衡。Khatri-Rao深度聚类框架通过表征学习进一步减少了深度聚类给出的数据摘要大小，同时保持了其准确性。

Conclusion: Khatri-Rao聚类范式能够有效克服传统基于质心聚类方法在数据摘要中的冗余问题，为大规模复杂数据集提供更简洁但同样准确的数据摘要解决方案。

Abstract: As datasets continue to grow in size and complexity, finding succinct yet accurate data summaries poses a key challenge. Centroid-based clustering, a widely adopted approach to address this challenge, finds informative summaries of datasets in terms of few prototypes, each representing a cluster in the data. Despite their wide adoption, the resulting data summaries often contain redundancies, limiting their effectiveness particularly in datasets characterized by a large number of underlying clusters. To overcome this limitation, we introduce the Khatri-Rao clustering paradigm that extends traditional centroid-based clustering to produce more succinct but equally accurate data summaries by postulating that centroids arise from the interaction of two or more succinct sets of protocentroids.
  We study two central approaches to centroid-based clustering, namely the well-established k-Means algorithm and the increasingly popular topic of deep clustering, under the lens of the Khatri-Rao paradigm. To this end, we introduce the Khatri-Rao k-Means algorithm and the Khatri-Rao deep clustering framework. Extensive experiments show that Khatri-Rao k-Means can strike a more favorable trade-off between succinctness and accuracy in data summarization than standard k-Means. Leveraging representation learning, the Khatri-Rao deep clustering framework offers even greater benefits, reducing even more the size of data summaries given by deep clustering while preserving their accuracy.

</details>


### [423] [Scale Dependent Data Duplication](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06603)
*Joshua Kazdan,Noam Levi,Rylan Schaeffer,Jessica Chudnovsky,Abhay Puri,Bo He,Mehmet Donmez,Sanmi Koyejo,David Donoho*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 研究发现数据重复对模型训练的影响是规模依赖的：随着模型能力增强，语义重复文档的梯度对齐度提高，而大规模语料库中语义碰撞加速，导致大模型在有限唯一性数据上训练时损失惩罚显著增加。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 预训练期间的数据重复会降低模型泛化能力并导致记忆化，但现有去重方法主要关注表面形式匹配，忽略了语义等价文档（如翻译文本）在模型能力提升后可能产生冗余训练信号的问题。

Method: 通过分析不同规模模型对语义等价文档的梯度对齐度变化；使用EmbeddingGemma-300m嵌入192百万个文档，研究大规模语料库中最近邻相似度分布；进行控制实验，在有限唯一文档池中采样数据进行预训练。

Result: 发现重复影响是规模依赖的：大模型对语义重复文档的梯度对齐度更高；大规模语料库中语义碰撞加速；有限唯一性数据对小模型影响较小，但对大模型造成快速增长的损失惩罚，打破朴素缩放外推。

Conclusion: 提出了显式缩放定律，帮助从业者估计预训练语料库语义唯一性有限导致的缩放偏差，识别并解决了未研究的规模依赖性问题，实现了更准确的大规模预测。

Abstract: Data duplication during pretraining can degrade generalization and lead to memorization, motivating aggressive deduplication pipelines. However, at web scale, it is unclear what constitutes a ``duplicate'': beyond surface-form matches, semantically equivalent documents (e.g. translations) may induce redundant training signals once models become sufficiently capable. Practically, this means that semantic duplicates operate increasingly like exact duplicates during training. We present evidence that duplication is scale-dependent in two ways. First, as model capability increases, cross-entropy loss gradients for semantically equivalent documents become more aligned. Smaller models, by contrast, produce gradients that reflect surface similarity (e.g., shared tokens) rather than semantic similarity. Second, we embedded all 192 million FineWeb-Edu-Dedup documents using EmbeddingGemma-300m. For moderate corpus sizes, the cosine similarity between nearest-neighbors follows an isotropic power law baseline. However, as corpus size grows to hundreds of billions of tokens, the nearest-neighbor similarities deviate sharply, indicating accelerated semantic collisions. Finally, controlled pretraining on data sampled with replacement from pools of finite unique documents shows that limited uniqueness yields mild degradation for small models, but rapidly increasing loss penalties for larger models, breaking naive scaling extrapolation. We derive explicit scaling laws that allow practitioners to estimate deviation from expected scaling due to limited semantic uniqueness of the pretraining corpus. Our results identify and resolve an unstudied source of scale-dependence, allowing for more accurate prediction at scale.

</details>


### [424] [Know When You're Wrong: Aligning Confidence with Correctness for LLM Error Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06604)
*Xie Xiaohu,Liu Xiaohu,Yao Benjamin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出基于输出锚定标记概率的归一化置信度评分方法，用于检测大语言模型的错误和幻觉，无需外部验证。理论分析揭示SFT能产生良好校准的置信度，而RL方法会导致过度自信，并提出后RL SFT自蒸馏方法来恢复置信度可靠性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型在关键决策系统中部署日益增多，但缺乏可靠的不确定性测量方法，这带来了基本可信度风险。需要一种能够直接检测错误和幻觉的方法，且开销最小、无需外部验证。

Method: 提出基于输出锚定标记概率的归一化置信度评分：结构化任务使用分类标签，开放生成任务使用自评估响应（是/否）。理论分析SFT通过最大似然估计产生良好校准的置信度，而PPO、GRPO和DPO等强化学习方法通过奖励利用导致过度自信。提出后RL SFT自蒸馏方法来恢复RL训练模型的置信度可靠性。

Result: 在7个多样化基准任务和5种不同架构和大小的LLM上验证了方法的有效性。SFT将平均置信度-正确性AUROC从0.806提升到0.879，校准误差从0.163降低到0.034（Qwen3-4B）。GRPO和DPO则降低了置信度可靠性。自适应RAG应用显示，仅使用58%的检索操作即可恢复TriviaQA上95%的最大可达到精度增益。

Conclusion: 提出的归一化置信度评分和自评估框架能够有效检测LLM的错误和幻觉。SFT能产生良好校准的置信度，而RL方法会导致过度自信。后RL SFT自蒸馏可以恢复RL训练模型的置信度可靠性，为实际应用提供了实用价值，特别是在自适应RAG系统中。

Abstract: As large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in critical decision-making systems, the lack of reliable methods to measure their uncertainty presents a fundamental trustworthiness risk. We introduce a normalized confidence score based on output anchor token probabilities: classification labels for structured tasks and self-evaluation responses (Yes/No) for open-ended generation. This enables direct detection of errors and hallucinations with minimal overhead and without external validation. We make three key contributions. First, we propose a normalized confidence score and self-evaluation framework that exposes reliable confidence estimates for error detection across seven diverse benchmark tasks and five LLMs of varying architectures and sizes. Second, our theoretical analysis reveals that supervised fine-tuning (SFT) yields well-calibrated confidence through maximum-likelihood estimation, whereas reinforcement learning methods (PPO, GRPO) and DPO induce overconfidence via reward exploitation. Third, we propose post-RL SFT with self-distillation to restore confidence reliability in RL-trained models. Empirical results demonstrated that SFT improved average confidence-correctness AUROC from 0.806 to 0.879 and reduced calibration error from 0.163 to 0.034 on Qwen3-4B, while GRPO and DPO degraded confidence reliability. We demonstrated practical value through adaptive retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) that selectively retrieves context when the model lacks confidence, using only 58\% of retrieval operations to recover 95\% of the maximum achievable accuracy gain on TriviaQA

</details>


### [425] [Structure-Aware Set Transformers: Temporal and Variable-Type Attention Biases for Asynchronous Clinical Time Series](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06605)
*Joohyung Lee,Kwanhyung Lee,Changhun Kim,Eunho Yang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: STAR-Set Transformer 通过引入时间局部性惩罚和变量类型亲和力偏置，在事件集标记化中恢复时间序列的时空结构，优于传统网格和基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 电子健康记录（EHR）作为不规则、异步的多变量时间序列，现有方法存在局限：网格方法需要插补或掩码，易引入误差或采样策略捷径；点集标记化避免了离散化但丢失了变量内轨迹和跨变量时间局部上下文。

Method: 提出STAR-Set Transformer，在事件集标记化基础上添加参数高效的软注意力偏置：1) 时间局部性惩罚 -|Δt|/τ（可学习时间尺度）；2) 变量类型亲和力 B_{s_i,s_j}（从学习特征兼容性矩阵获得）。评估了10种深度融合策略。

Result: 在三个ICU预测任务上，STAR-Set取得最佳性能：CPR（AUC 0.7158/APR 0.0026）、死亡率（0.9164/0.2033）、血管加压药使用（0.8373/0.1258），优于常规网格、事件时间网格和先前的集基线方法。

Conclusion: STAR-Set Transformer通过可学习的τ和B提供了可解释的时间上下文和变量交互摘要，为上下文感知的时间序列模型提供了一个实用的插件式解决方案。

Abstract: Electronic health records (EHR) are irregular, asynchronous multivariate time series. As time-series foundation models increasingly tokenize events rather than discretizing time, the input layout becomes a key design choice. Grids expose time$\times$variable structure but require imputation or missingness masks, risking error or sampling-policy shortcuts. Point-set tokenization avoids discretization but loses within-variable trajectories and time-local cross-variable context (Fig.1). We restore these priors in STructure-AwaRe (STAR) Set Transformer by adding parameter-efficient soft attention biases: a temporal locality penalty $-|Δt|/τ$ with learnable timescales and a variable-type affinity $B_{s_i,s_j}$ from a learned feature-compatibility matrix. We benchmark 10 depth-wise fusion schedules (Fig.2). On three ICU prediction tasks, STAR-Set achieves AUC/APR of 0.7158/0.0026 (CPR), 0.9164/0.2033 (mortality), and 0.8373/0.1258 (vasopressor use), outperforming regular-grid, event-time grid, and prior set baselines. Learned $τ$ and $B$ provide interpretable summaries of temporal context and variable interactions, offering a practical plug-in for context-informed time-series models.

</details>


### [426] [LegoNet: Memory Footprint Reduction Through Block Weight Clustering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06606)
*Joseph Bingham,Noah Green,Saman Zonouz*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: LegoNet是一种无需重新训练或微调的神经网络压缩技术，通过将整个模型的权重构建为块并聚类，实现了64倍压缩且无精度损失，128倍压缩仅损失3%精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着神经网络应用对精度和性能要求的提高，模型规模和内存占用不断增长，这在缓存和内存有限的嵌入式设备上限制了最先进神经网络架构的部署。

Method: 提出LegoNet压缩技术，将整个模型的权重（不考虑层类型）构建为块，并对这些生成的块进行聚类。使用块而非单个值进行权重聚类，能够用少量块（如32个4x4块）表示整个模型。

Result: 在Cifar-10和ImageNet上训练的ResNet-50模型，使用32个4x4块压缩内存占用超过64倍且无精度损失；使用16个4x4块可实现128倍压缩，精度损失小于3%。所有这些结果均无需重新训练或微调。

Conclusion: LegoNet通过块构建和聚类技术，实现了对神经网络模型的高效压缩，特别适合资源受限的嵌入式设备，在保持精度的同时显著减少内存占用。

Abstract: As the need for neural network-based applications to become more accurate and powerful grows, so too does their size and memory footprint. With embedded devices, whose cache and RAM are limited, this growth hinders their ability to leverage state-of-the-art neural network architectures. In this work, we propose \textbf{LegoNet}, a compression technique that \textbf{constructs blocks of weights of the entire model regardless of layer type} and clusters these induced blocks. Using blocks instead of individual values to cluster the weights, we were able to compress ResNet-50 trained for Cifar-10 and ImageNet with only 32 4x4 blocks, compressing the memory footprint by over a factor of \textbf{64x without having to remove any weights} or changing the architecture and \textbf{no loss to accuracy}, nor retraining or any data, and show how to find an arrangement of 16 4x4 blocks that gives a compression ratio of \textbf{128x with less than 3\% accuracy loss}. This was all achieved with \textbf{no need for (re)training or fine-tuning}.

</details>


### [427] [Valid Feature-Level Inference for Tabular Foundation Models via the Conditional Randomization Test](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06609)
*Mohamed Salem*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种结合条件随机化检验（CRT）与TabPFN（表格数据的概率基础模型）的实用方法，用于特征级假设检验，即使在非线性和相关场景下也能获得有限样本有效的p值。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代机器学习模型表达能力强大但难以进行统计分析。虽然黑盒预测器能取得良好的经验性能，但很少能为评估单个特征是否包含目标变量信息提供有效的假设检验或p值。

Method: 将条件随机化检验（CRT）与TabPFN（表格数据的概率基础模型）相结合。CRT用于特征级假设检验，TabPFN提供概率预测，无需重新训练模型或参数假设。

Result: 该方法能够在非线性和相关设置下，为条件特征相关性生成有限样本有效的p值，无需模型重新训练或参数假设。

Conclusion: 提出了一种实用的特征级假设检验方法，结合CRT和TabPFN，为黑盒模型提供了统计上有效的特征重要性评估工具。

Abstract: Modern machine learning models are highly expressive but notoriously difficult to analyze statistically. In particular, while black-box predictors can achieve strong empirical performance, they rarely provide valid hypothesis tests or p-values for assessing whether individual features contain information about a target variable. This article presents a practical approach to feature-level hypothesis testing that combines the Conditional Randomization Test (CRT) with TabPFN, a probabilistic foundation model for tabular data. The resulting procedure yields finite-sample valid p-values for conditional feature relevance, even in nonlinear and correlated settings, without requiring model retraining or parametric assumptions.

</details>


### [428] [CapTrack: Multifaceted Evaluation of Forgetting in LLM Post-Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06610)
*Lukas Thede,Stefan Winzeck,Zeynep Akata,Jonathan Richard Schwarz*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了CapTrack框架，从能力角度分析LLM后训练中的遗忘问题，发现遗忘不仅仅是参数知识的丢失，还包括鲁棒性和默认行为的系统性漂移。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统对LLM后训练遗忘的理解局限于参数或事实知识的丢失，这种准确率中心的观点不足以描述现代基础模型的遗忘现象。作者认为遗忘应被视为系统性的模型漂移，会损害模型行为和用户体验。

Method: 提出了CapTrack框架，结合行为分类学和基于现有基准及针对性适配的评估套件，从能力角度分析LLM遗忘。进行了大规模实证研究，涵盖不同后训练算法、领域和模型家族（包括80B参数模型）。

Result: 研究发现遗忘超出了参数知识范围，在鲁棒性和默认行为方面存在显著漂移。指令微调诱导最强的相对漂移，而偏好优化更保守，能部分恢复丢失的能力。不同模型家族间的差异持续存在，没有普遍适用的缓解策略。

Conclusion: 需要从能力角度重新审视LLM遗忘问题，CapTrack框架为此提供了系统分析工具。研究结果强调了考虑模型系统性行为漂移的重要性，而非仅关注参数知识丢失。

Abstract: Large language model (LLM) post-training enhances latent skills, unlocks value alignment, improves performance, and enables domain adaptation. Unfortunately, post-training is known to induce forgetting, especially in the ubiquitous use-case of leveraging third-party pre-trained models, which is typically understood as a loss of parametric or factual knowledge. We argue that this accuracy-centric view is insufficient for modern foundation models and instead define forgetting as systematic model drift that degrades behavior and user experience. In this context, we introduce \textbf{CapTrack}, a capability-centric framework for analyzing forgetting in LLMs that combines a behavioral taxonomy with an evaluation suite built on established benchmarks and targeted adaptations. Using CapTrack, we conduct a large-scale empirical study across post-training algorithms, domains, and model families, including models up to 80B parameters. We find that forgetting extends beyond parametric knowledge, with pronounced drift in robustness and default behaviors. Instruction fine-tuning induces the strongest relative drift, while preference optimization is more conservative and can partially recover lost capabilities. Differences across model families persist, and no universal mitigation emerges.

</details>


### [429] [Consensus is Not Verification: Why Crowd Wisdom Strategies Fail for LLM Truthfulness](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06612)
*Yegor Denisov-Blanch,Joshua Kazdan,Jessica Chudnovsky,Rylan Schaeffer,Sheng Guan,Soji Adeshina,Sanmi Koyejo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 研究表明，在无法验证答案正确性的领域（如真实性判断），通过增加推理计算（如多次采样投票）并不能提升语言模型的准确性，反而可能放大共同错误认知。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在数学和代码等有外部验证器的领域，增加推理计算（如Pass@k）能通过筛选候选答案提升性能。但在缺乏便捷验证的领域（如真实性判断），能否通过类似方法提升准确性？

Method: 在五个基准测试和多个模型上，对比了不同推理计算规模（最高达朴素采样的25倍）下投票式聚合方法的性能，分析了模型输出相关性、置信度权重效果，以及模型在不确定情况下的预测能力。

Result: 1. 聚合方法相比单样本基线无一致准确性提升，反而常放大共同误解。2. 模型误差高度相关，即使面对随机字符串输入，不同模型输出也相关。3. 基于置信度的加权无益，因为模型自报置信度无法可靠区分正误答案。

Conclusion: 划定了推理时扩展的边界：在可验证领域，更多样本为验证器提供更多候选；在不可验证领域，更多样本仅强化共同误解。模型更擅长预测同系列模型会说什么，而非识别真相，揭示了社会预测与真相验证的分离。

Abstract: Pass@k and other methods of scaling inference compute can improve language model performance in domains with external verifiers, including mathematics and code, where incorrect candidates can be filtered reliably. This raises a natural question: can we similarly scale compute to elicit gains in truthfulness for domains without convenient verification? We show that across five benchmarks and models, surprisingly, it cannot. Even at 25x the inference cost of naive sampling, polling-style aggregation yields no consistent accuracy gains over single-sample baselines and often amplifies shared misconceptions. We find that under uncertainty, models are better at predicting what other models will say within model ensembles than at identifying what is true, revealing a separation between social prediction and truth verification. Across models and benchmarks, aggregation fails to provide a robust truth signal because language model errors are strongly correlated. The source of correlation goes beyond any individual benchmark: we show that even when conditioned on out of distribution random strings and asked to produce pseudo-random outputs, different models produce correlated outputs. Confidence-based weighting provides no benefit because self-reported confidence fails to reliably distinguish correct from incorrect answers. These results delineate a boundary for inference-time scaling: in verified domains, additional samples provide more candidates for a verifier to filter; in unverified domains, additional samples merely reinforce shared misconceptions.

</details>


### [430] [OptiRoulette Optimizer: A New Stochastic Meta-Optimizer for up to 5.3x Faster Convergence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06613)
*Stamatis Mastromichalakis*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: OptiRoulette是一种随机元优化器，它在训练过程中动态选择更新规则而非固定单一优化器，通过多种机制提升收敛可靠性和训练效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统深度学习训练通常固定使用单一优化器（如AdamW），但不同优化器在不同训练阶段和任务上表现各异。固定优化器可能导致收敛不可靠、训练效率低下，特别是在追求高精度目标时。因此需要一种能够动态选择合适优化器的机制来提升训练效果。

Method: OptiRoulette采用多种核心技术：1) 预热优化器锁定：训练初期固定优化器；2) 从活跃优化器池中随机采样选择更新规则；3) 优化器切换时的兼容性感知学习率缩放；4) 失败感知的池替换机制。该方法实现为torch.optim.Optimizer兼容的组件，可通过pip安装。

Result: 在五个图像分类数据集上的10次重复实验显示显著提升：CIFAR-100准确率从67.34%提升至76.56%（+9.22pp），CIFAR-100-C从29.04%到33.55%（+4.52pp），SVHN从96.67%到97.56%（+0.89pp），Tiny ImageNet从56.69%到66.42%（+9.73pp），Caltech-256从59.46%到69.20%（+9.74pp）。更重要的是在高目标下的收敛可靠性：所有数据集在10/10次运行中都达到了指定验证精度，而AdamW基线均未达到。在共享目标下，OptiRoulette还减少了时间到目标（如Caltech-256在0.59精度：25.7 vs 77.0轮次）。

Conclusion: OptiRoulette通过动态选择优化器显著提升了深度学习训练的收敛可靠性和效率，特别是在追求高精度目标时表现突出。该方法为优化器选择提供了新思路，且易于集成到现有PyTorch训练流程中。

Abstract: This paper presents OptiRoulette, a stochastic meta-optimizer that selects update rules during training instead of fixing a single optimizer. The method combines warmup optimizer locking, random sampling from an active optimizer pool, compatibility-aware learning-rate scaling during optimizer transitions, and failure-aware pool replacement. OptiRoulette is implemented as a drop-in, torch.optim.Optimizer-compatible component and packaged for pip installation. We report completed 10-seed results on five image-classification suites: CIFAR-100, CIFAR-100-C, SVHN, Tiny ImageNet, and Caltech-256. Against a single-optimizer AdamW baseline, OptiRoulette improves mean test accuracy from 0.6734 to 0.7656 on CIFAR-100 (+9.22 percentage points), 0.2904 to 0.3355 on CIFAR-100-C (+4.52), 0.9667 to 0.9756 on SVHN (+0.89), 0.5669 to 0.6642 on Tiny ImageNet (+9.73), and 0.5946 to 0.6920 on Caltech-256 (+9.74). Its main advantage is convergence reliability at higher targets: it reaches CIFAR-100/CIFAR-100-C 0.75, SVHN 0.96, Tiny ImageNet 0.65, and Caltech-256 0.62 validation accuracy in 10/10 runs, while the AdamW baseline reaches none of these targets within budget. On shared targets, OptiRoulette also reduces time-to-target (e.g., Caltech-256 at 0.59: 25.7 vs 77.0 epochs). Paired-seed deltas are positive on all datasets; CIFAR-100-C test ROC-AUC is the only metric not statistically significant in the current 10-seed study.

</details>


### [431] [Correlation Analysis of Generative Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06614)
*Zhengguo Li,Chaobing Zheng,Wei Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一个基于线性方程的统一表示框架，用于分析扩散模型和流匹配方法，并指出现有方法中噪声数据与预测目标之间相关性较弱的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 通过对现有扩散模型和流匹配方法的文献回顾，发现这些方法都使用神经网络从噪声数据预测预定义目标。论文旨在为这些模型提供一个统一的理论分析框架，并识别现有方法中的潜在问题。

Method: 提出一个基于两个简单线性方程的统一表示框架来描述扩散模型和流匹配方法，然后对该模型进行理论分析，特别关注噪声数据与预测目标之间的相关性。

Result: 理论分析表明，在现有扩散模型和流匹配方法中，噪声数据与预测目标之间的相关性有时较弱，这可能影响所有模型中起关键作用的预测（或学习）过程。

Conclusion: 该研究为扩散模型和流匹配提供了一个统一的理论框架，揭示了现有方法中噪声数据与目标相关性不足的问题，为改进这些模型的预测性能提供了理论指导。

Abstract: Based on literature review about existing diffusion models and flow matching with a neural network to predict a predefined target from noisy data, a unified representation is first proposed for these models using two simple linear equations in this paper. Theoretical analysis of the proposed model is then presented. Our theoretical analysis shows that the correlation between the noisy data and the predicted target is sometimes weak in the existing diffusion models and flow matching. This might affect the prediction (or learning) process which plays a crucial role in all models.

</details>


### [432] [Annealed Co-Generation: Disentangling Variables via Progressive Pairwise Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06615)
*Hantao Zhang,Jieke Wu,Mingda Xu,Xiao Hu,Yingxuan You,Pascal Fua*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于成对块建模的退火协同生成框架，用于多变量科学应用，通过低维扩散模型和共享变量耦合实现高效的多变量协同生成。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 针对科学应用中多变量协同生成的计算负担和数据不平衡问题，作者主张采用成对块建模而非联合建模所有变量，以降低计算复杂度并改善数据分布问题。

Method: 提出退火协同生成框架：1) 在解耦的因果变量对上训练无条件扩散模型；2) 通过共享变量耦合这些成对模型；3) 采用三阶段退火过程（共识、加热、冷却）确保共享变量一致性和分布约束。

Result: 在流场补全和抗体生成两个科学任务上验证了框架的灵活性和有效性，所有数据和代码将在发表后公开。

Conclusion: 该框架通过低维扩散模型和成对块建模实现了高效的多变量协同生成，避免了高维建模的计算负担，同时保持了生成的一致性和准确性。

Abstract: For multivariate co-generation in scientific applications, we advocate pairwise block rather than joint modeling of all variables. This design mitigates the computational burden and data imbalance. To this end, we propose an Annealed Co-Generation (ACG) framework that replaces high-dimensional diffusion modeling with a low-dimensional diffusion model, which enables multivariate co-generation by composing pairwise variable generations. We first train an unconditional diffusion model over causal variables that are disentangled into pairs. At inference time, we recover the joint distribution by coupling these pairwise models through shared common variables, enabling coherent multivariate generation without any additional training. By employing a three-stage annealing process-Consensus, Heating, and Cooling-our method enforces consistency across shared common variables and progressively constrains each pairwise data distribution to lie on a learnable manifold, while maintaining high likelihood within each pair. We demonstrate the framework's flexibility and efficacy on two distinct scientific tasks: flow-field completion and antibody generation. All datasets and code will be made publicly available upon publication.

</details>


### [433] [RACER: Risk-Aware Calibrated Efficient Routing for Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06616)
*Sai Hao,Hao Zeng,Hongxin Wei,Bingyi Jing*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: RACER：一种基于风险控制的LLM路由方法，通过构建嵌套模型集和校准阈值来最小化预期集合大小并控制误路由风险


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM路由器大多依赖单一模型选择，容易受到误路由影响，需要一种能够优化成本-性能权衡并控制风险的路由方法

Method: 将LLM路由形式化为α-VOR问题，提出RACER方法：通过增强评分构建嵌套模型集，利用有限样本集中界限校准阈值，支持可变集合大小和弃权机制

Result: 理论证明RACER在未见测试数据上实现分布无关的风险控制，实验验证其理论保证，并显著提升下游任务准确率

Conclusion: RACER为多模型系统中的LLM路由提供了一种理论保证的风险控制方法，能够有效平衡成本与性能

Abstract: Efficiently routing queries to the optimal large language model (LLM) is crucial for optimizing the cost-performance trade-off in multi-model systems. However, most existing routers rely on single-model selection, making them susceptible to misrouting. In this work, we formulate LLM routing as the $α$-VOR problem to minimize expected set size while controlling the misrouting risk, and propose a novel method -- RACER, extending base routers to output model sets that can be subsequently aggregated for improved output. In particular, RACER constructs nested model sets via augmented scoring and utilizes finite-sample concentration bounds to calibrate a threshold that allows for both variable set sizes and abstention. We theoretically prove that RACER achieves rigorous distribution-free risk control on unseen test data in a post-hoc and model-agnostic manner. Extensive experiments verify our theoretical guarantees and demonstrate that RACER consistently enhances downstream accuracy across a wide range of benchmarks.

</details>


### [434] [Evo: Autoregressive-Diffusion Large Language Models with Evolving Balance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06617)
*Junde Wu,Minhao Hu,Jiayuan Zhu,Yuyuan Liu,Tianyi Zhang,Kang Li,Jingkun Chen,Jiazhen Pan,Min Xu,Yueming Jin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Evo是一种双轨潜在轨迹模型，将自回归和基于扩散的语言生成统一在连续演化生成框架中，通过语义成熟度变量实现自适应平衡，在保持快速推理的同时获得高质量输出。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有语言生成方法将自回归（AR）解码和扩散生成视为独立范式，各有优劣：AR快速但可能陷入局部最优，扩散质量高但计算昂贵。需要一种统一框架来平衡两者优势。

Method: 将文本生成重新概念化为潜在流，每个token对应一个随时间演化的向量嵌入，语义成熟度变量t_i∈[0,1]控制生成模式：低t_i对应AR式精炼，高t_i对应扩散式规划。模型作为时间条件Transformer实现，共享向量场控制，端到端训练以联合推断潜在代码及其进展时间。

Result: Evo 8B在15个多样化基准测试中取得SOTA或极具竞争力的结果，包括推理（GSM8K、ARC-C）、代码生成（HumanEval、MBPP）和通用语言理解，同时保持快速推理速度。

Conclusion: Evo为LLM设计提供了新范式，兼具强大的生成质量、鲁棒的符号推理和解码效率，证明了统一AR和扩散生成框架的可行性。

Abstract: We introduce \textbf{Evo}, a duality latent trajectory model that bridges autoregressive (AR) and diffusion-based language generation within a continuous evolutionary generative framework. Rather than treating AR decoding and diffusion generation as separate paradigms, Evo reconceptualizes text generation as a latent flow: each token is associated with a vector-valued embedding that evolves over a progression variable $t_i \in [0, 1]$, indicating its semantic maturity. Low $t_i$ values correspond to confident AR-like refinement, while high values invoke diffusion-style planning, allowing the model to adaptively balance AR and diffusion based on uncertainty. Theoretically, we show that both AR and diffusion models emerge as discretizations of a shared probability flow, and we derive Evo's training objective from a unified variational ELBO. The model is implemented as a time-conditioned Transformer governed by a shared vector field, trained end-to-end to jointly infer latent codes and their progression times. During decoding, Evo performs efficient, semantics-aware refinement, achieving high-quality outputs without sacrificing speed. Empirically, Evo 8B achieves state-of-the-art or highly competitive results on 15 diverse benchmarks, including reasoning (GSM8K, ARC-C), code generation (HumanEval, MBPP), and general language understanding, while maintaining fast inference speed. Our results demonstrate that Evo delivers a new paradigm for LLM design with strong generation quality, robust symbolic reasoning, and decoding efficiency.

</details>


### [435] [Distilling and Adapting: A Topology-Aware Framework for Zero-Shot Interaction Prediction in Multiplex Biological Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06618)
*Alana Deng,Sugitha Janarthanan,Yan Sun,Zihao Jing,Pingzhao Hu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一个用于多路生物网络零样本相互作用预测的新框架，通过上下文表示学习和知识蒸馏解决现有方法在建模多路性、整合结构和序列信息以及零样本预测方面的不足


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法在多路生物网络建模中存在三个主要问题：1) 对多路性建模不足；2) 难以整合结构和序列信息；3) 对无先验邻域信息的未见实体进行零样本预测困难。需要开发能够同时解决这些限制的新方法

Method: 提出基于上下文表示学习和知识蒸馏的框架：1) 利用领域特定基础模型生成丰富嵌入；2) 引入拓扑感知图分词器捕捉多路性和高阶连接性；3) 使用对比学习对齐跨模态嵌入；4) 采用师生蒸馏策略实现鲁棒的零样本泛化

Result: 实验结果表明，该框架在多路生物网络的相互作用预测任务上优于最先进方法，为探索各种生物相互作用和推进个性化治疗提供了强大工具

Conclusion: 该研究成功解决了多路生物网络中零样本相互作用预测的关键挑战，通过结合上下文表示学习、拓扑感知建模和知识蒸馏技术，实现了对未见实体的有效预测，为复杂生物系统分析提供了新方法

Abstract: Multiplex Biological Networks (MBNs), which represent multiple interaction types between entities, are crucial for understanding complex biological systems. Yet, existing methods often inadequately model multiplexity, struggle to integrate structural and sequence information, and face difficulties in zero-shot prediction for unseen entities with no prior neighbourhood information. To address these limitations, we propose a novel framework for zero-shot interaction prediction in MBNs by leveraging context-aware representation learning and knowledge distillation. Our approach leverages domain-specific foundation models to generate enriched embeddings, introduces a topology-aware graph tokenizer to capture multiplexity and higher-order connectivity, and employs contrastive learning to align embeddings across modalities. A teacher-student distillation strategy further enables robust zero-shot generalization. Experimental results demonstrate that our framework outperforms state-of-the-art methods in interaction prediction for MBNs, providing a powerful tool for exploring various biological interactions and advancing personalized therapeutics.

</details>


### [436] [Not all tokens are needed(NAT): token efficient reinforcement learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06619)
*Hejian Sang,Yuanda Xu,Zhengze Zhou,Ran He,Zhipeng Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: NAT框架通过选择性更新部分token而非全部token，显著降低RL训练的计算和内存开销，同时保持学习效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 强化学习在大语言模型中应用广泛，但长链式思维轨迹的完整token更新会消耗大量训练成本，成为RL扩展的瓶颈。

Method: 提出NAT框架，使用Horvitz-Thompson重加权进行无偏部分token策略梯度估计，配合URS和RPC两种token选择方案，仅更新选定token子集。

Result: 在数学推理基准测试中，NAT使用50%的token即可达到完整token GRPO的性能，RPC为Qwen3-8B节省18%峰值GPU内存和29%RL训练时间。

Conclusion: NAT将token预算作为首要优化目标，为长轨迹的RL扩展提供了高效且正交的路径。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) has become a key driver of progress in large language models, but scaling RL to long chain-of-thought (CoT) trajectories is increasingly constrained by backpropagation over every generated token. Even with optimized rollout engines, full-token updates can consume a large fraction of total training cost, turning token length into a hidden tax on RL. We introduce Not All Tokens Are Needed (NAT), a unified framework that makes the token budget a first-class optimization primitive. NAT updates the policy using only a selected subset of generated tokens while preserving the learning signal of full-sequence RL. The core idea is an unbiased partial-token policy-gradient estimator via Horvitz-Thompson reweighting, which ensures statistically correct gradients despite subsampling. We instantiate NAT with two simple, plug-and-play token selection schemes: Uniform Random Sampling (URS) and Random Prefix Cutting (RPC), both of which reduce forward and backward compute and memory without modifying the reward computation or rollout pipeline. Across mathematical reasoning benchmarks, NAT matches full-token GRPO performance while using as few as 50% of tokens, providing an efficient and orthogonal pathway to scaling RL beyond the limits imposed by long trajectories. In our experiments, RPC saves 18% peak GPU memory and 29% forward and backward RL training time for Qwen3-8B.

</details>


### [437] [Reward Under Attack: Analyzing the Robustness and Hackability of Process Reward Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06621)
*Rishabh Tiwari,Aditya Tomar,Udbhav Bamba,Monishwaran Maheswaran,Heng Yang,Michael W. Mahoney,Kurt Keutzer,Amir Gholami*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 当前最先进的流程奖励模型（PRMs）存在系统性可利用漏洞，在对抗性优化压力下容易被欺骗，导致高奖励但低准确性的结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: PRMs正成为LLM推理流程的核心组件，但现有模型在对抗性攻击下存在系统性漏洞，需要建立诊断框架来评估其鲁棒性。

Method: 提出了三级诊断框架：1）静态扰动分析，评估表面风格变化与逻辑破坏的检测能力；2）基于梯度的对抗优化攻击；3）RL诱导的奖励黑客攻击，在AIME问题上训练策略。

Result: 发现PRMs存在流畅性-逻辑分离现象：对表面风格变化高度不变（奖励变化<0.1），但对逻辑破坏检测不一致；梯度攻击可显著提升无效轨迹的奖励；RL训练的策略在AIME问题上获得接近完美的PRM奖励（>0.9），但真实准确率很低（<4%），43%的奖励增益来自风格捷径。

Conclusion: 当前PRMs主要作为流畅性检测器而非推理验证器，存在系统性盲点，不适合作为训练信号。作者发布了PRM-BiasBench和诊断工具包，供部署前进行鲁棒性评估。

Abstract: Process Reward Models (PRMs) are rapidly becoming the backbone of LLM reasoning pipelines, yet we demonstrate that state-of-the-art PRMs are systematically exploitable under adversarial optimization pressure. To address this, we introduce a three-tiered diagnostic framework that applies increasing adversarial pressure to quantify these vulnerabilities. Static perturbation analysis uncovers a fluency-logic dissociation: high invariance to surface-level style changes reward changes $<$0.1, yet inconsistent detection of logically-corrupted reasoning, with different models failing on different attack types. Adversarial optimization demonstrates that gradient-based attacks inflate rewards on invalid trajectories, with reward landscapes exhibiting wide, exploitable peaks. RL-induced reward hacking exposes the critical failure mode: policies trained on AIME problems achieve near-perfect PRM rewards ($>$0.9), while ground-truth accuracy remains low (below 4%), with 43% of reward gains attributable to stylistic shortcuts. These findings reveal that current PRMs function as fluency detectors rather than reasoning verifiers, creating systematic blind spots that undermine their use as training signals. We release PRM-BiasBench and a diagnostic toolkit to enable robustness evaluation before deployment. The code and dataset are available at https://github.com/SqueezeAILab/reward-under-attack.

</details>


### [438] [From ARIMA to Attention: Power Load Forecasting Using Temporal Deep Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06622)
*Suhasnadh Reddy Veluru,Sai Teja Erukude,Viswa Chaitanya Marella*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 对ARIMA、LSTM、BiLSTM和Transformer四种模型在PJM电力消费数据上进行短期负荷预测的实证评估，发现Transformer模型表现最佳


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 准确的短期电力负荷预测对现代电力系统的有效管理、优化和稳健性至关重要，需要评估不同预测方法的性能

Method: 使用PJM小时能源消费数据，通过插值、归一化和滑动窗口序列方法进行数据处理，评估ARIMA、LSTM、BiLSTM和Transformer四种模型在24小时预测范围内的性能

Result: Transformer模型（基于自注意力机制）表现最佳，MAPE为3.8%，在准确性和鲁棒性方面均优于其他模型

Conclusion: 注意力机制架构在准确捕捉电力消费数据中复杂时间模式方面具有巨大潜力

Abstract: Accurate short-term power load forecasting is important to effectively manage, optimize, and ensure the robustness of modern power systems. This paper performs an empirical evaluation of a traditional statistical model and deep learning approaches for predicting short-term energy load. Four models, namely ARIMA, LSTM, BiLSTM, and Transformer, were leveraged on the PJM Hourly Energy Consumption data. The data processing involved interpolation, normalization, and a sliding-window sequence method. Each model's forecasting performance was evaluated for the 24-hour horizon using MAE, RMSE, and MAPE. Of the models tested, the Transformer model, which relies on self-attention algorithms, produced the best results with 3.8 percent of MAPE, with performance above any model in both accuracy and robustness. These findings underscore the growing potential of attention-based architectures in accurately capturing complex temporal patterns in power consumption data.

</details>


### [439] [Advances in GRPO for Generation Models: A Survey](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06623)
*Zexiang Liu,Xianglong He,Yangguang Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Flow-GRPO是GRPO在生成模型中的扩展，用于稳定强化学习对齐，已广泛应用于文本到图像、视频、音频、3D等多种生成任务，成为现代生成模型的通用对齐框架。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大规模流匹配模型在文本到图像、视频、3D和语音合成等生成任务中表现优异，但如何将其输出与人类偏好和任务特定目标对齐仍然具有挑战性。

Method: Flow-GRPO将组相对策略优化（GRPO）扩展到生成模型，实现生成系统的稳定强化学习对齐，包括奖励信号设计、信用分配、采样效率、多样性保持、奖励黑客缓解和奖励模型构建等方法改进。

Result: Flow-GRPO引发了快速的研究增长，在方法论改进和应用领域扩展方面都取得了显著进展，涵盖了文本到图像、视频生成、图像编辑、语音音频、3D建模、具身视觉语言动作系统、统一多模态模型、自回归和掩码扩散模型以及修复任务等多个领域。

Conclusion: Flow-GRPO作为现代生成模型的通用对齐框架，通过理论洞察和实践适应，为生成模型的对齐提供了有效解决方案，但可扩展和鲁棒的基于强化的生成仍然面临关键开放挑战。

Abstract: Large-scale flow matching models have achieved strong performance across generative tasks such as text-to-image, video, 3D, and speech synthesis. However, aligning their outputs with human preferences and task-specific objectives remains challenging. Flow-GRPO extends Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) to generation models, enabling stable reinforcement learning alignment for generative systems. Since its introduction, Flow-GRPO has triggered rapid research growth, spanning methodological refinements and diverse application domains. This survey provides a comprehensive review of Flow-GRPO and its subsequent developments. We organize existing work along two primary dimensions. First, we analyze methodological advances beyond the original framework, including reward signal design, credit assignment, sampling efficiency, diversity preservation, reward hacking mitigation, and reward model construction. Second, we examine extensions of GRPO-based alignment across generative paradigms and modalities, including text-to-image, video generation, image editing, speech and audio, 3D modeling, embodied vision-language-action systems, unified multimodal models, autoregressive and masked diffusion models, and restoration tasks. By synthesizing theoretical insights and practical adaptations, this survey highlights Flow-GRPO as a general alignment framework for modern generative models and outlines key open challenges for scalable and robust reinforcement-based generation.

</details>


### [440] [Pavement Missing Condition Data Imputation through Collective Learning-Based Graph Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06625)
*Ke Yu,Lu Gao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于图卷积网络的集体学习方法，用于处理路面状况数据中的缺失值，通过捕捉相邻路段间的依赖关系来填补缺失数据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 路面状况数据对道路网络维护至关重要，但由于传感器错误和检查周期不规律等原因，数据经常不完整。缺失数据（特别是系统性缺失）会导致信息损失、统计能力降低和评估偏差。现有方法通常丢弃包含缺失值的整个数据点或仅通过数据相关性进行填补，未能充分利用相邻路段间的空间依赖关系。

Method: 提出基于集体学习的图卷积网络方法，整合相邻路段的特征和观测路段条件间的依赖关系来学习缺失值。与图神经网络的其他变体不同，该方法能够捕捉相邻路面路段条件间的依赖关系。

Result: 使用德克萨斯州交通部奥斯汀地区收集的路面状况数据进行案例研究，实验表明所提出的模型在填补缺失数据方面能够产生有希望的结果。

Conclusion: 基于图卷积网络的集体学习方法能够有效处理路面状况数据中的缺失值问题，通过利用相邻路段间的空间依赖关系，为道路维护决策提供更完整准确的数据支持。

Abstract: Pavement condition data is important in providing information regarding the current state of the road network and in determining the needs of maintenance and rehabilitation treatments. However, the condition data is often incomplete due to various reasons such as sensor errors and non-periodic inspection schedules. Missing data, especially data missing systematically, presents loss of information, reduces statistical power, and introduces biased assessment. Existing methods in dealing with missing data usually discard entire data points with missing values or impute through data correlation. In this paper, we used a collective learning-based Graph Convolutional Networks, which integrates both features of adjacent sections and dependencies between observed section conditions to learn missing condition values. Unlike other variants of graph neural networks, the proposed approach is able to capture dependent relationship between the conditions of adjacent pavement sections. In the case study, pavement condition data collected from Texas Department of Transportation Austin District were used. Experiments show that the proposed model was able to produce promising results in imputing the missing data.

</details>


### [441] [Grouter: Decoupling Routing from Representation for Accelerated MoE Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06626)
*Yuqi Xu,Rizhen Hu,Zihan Liu,Mou Sun,Kun Yuan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Grouter通过预训练的路由策略加速MoE模型训练，将结构优化与权重更新解耦，提升收敛速度和质量


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统MoE训练中，路由策略和专家权重同时优化，存在组合空间巨大、收敛缓慢、训练不稳定的问题

Method: 从已训练的MoE模型中蒸馏高质量路由结构作为固定路由器，引入专家折叠适应不同模型配置，专家调优平衡工作负载，利用结构先验进行针对性优化

Result: Grouter提升预训练数据利用率4.28倍，实现高达33.5%的吞吐量加速，在性能和效率上均表现优异

Conclusion: 预路由作为可扩展MoE训练的基本范式，通过解耦结构优化和权重更新，显著提升训练效率和稳定性

Abstract: Traditional Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) training typically proceeds without any structural priors, effectively requiring the model to simultaneously train expert weights while searching for an optimal routing policy within a vast combinatorial space. This entanglement often leads to sluggish convergence and training instabilities. This paper introduces Grouter, a preemptive routing method that by distilling high-quality structures from fully-trained MoE models and serving as a fixed router for target models. By decoupling structural optimization from weight updates, Grouter significantly accelerates both the speed and quality of model convergence. To ensure the framework's versatility, we also introduce expert folding to adapt Grouter across varying model configurations and expert tuning to rebalance workloads across different data distributions. Furthermore, by leveraging the structural priors provided by preemptive routing, we can implement targeted optimizations to further enhance training throughput. Experiments demonstrate that Grouter achieves superior performance and efficiency which boosts pre-training data utilization by 4.28x and achieves up to 33.5% throughput acceleration, establishing preemptive routing as a fundamental paradigm for scalable MoE training.

</details>


### [442] [Leakage Safe Graph Features for Interpretable Fraud Detection in Temporal Transaction Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06632)
*Hamideh Khaleghpour,Brett McKinney*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种时间敏感、防泄漏的图特征提取方法，用于时间交易网络中的非法实体检测，通过构建因果图特征防止前瞻偏差，在Elliptic数据集上验证了图结构特征对欺诈检测的补充价值。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有非法交易检测通常基于交易层面属性，但欺诈行为也可能通过网络结构（如中心枢纽、高流量中介、协调社区）表现出来。需要开发时间敏感且防泄漏的图特征提取方法，为时间交易网络提供可解释的结构特征。

Method: 1. 使用Elliptic数据集构建有向交易图；2. 计算可解释的结构描述符：度统计、PageRank、HITS hub/authority分数、k-core指数、邻域可达性度量；3. 为防止前瞻偏差，计算仅使用每个时间步之前观察到的边的因果图特征变体；4. 使用严格时间分割的随机森林分类器进行训练和评估。

Result: 在保留的未来测试期间获得强区分能力（ROC-AUC约0.85，平均精度约0.54）。虽然交易属性仍是主要预测信号，但图衍生特征提供了补充的可解释性，支持风险上下文分析。通过Precision@k评估操作效用，校准曲线和Brier分数显示校准模型能提供更好的概率对齐。

Conclusion: 因果图特征提取是时间欺诈检测流程中实用且可解释的增强方法，图结构特征为调查工作流程提供了有价值的补充信息，特别是通过校准模型能获得更好的概率对齐用于分类排序。

Abstract: Illicit transaction detection is often driven by transaction level attributes however, fraudulent behavior may also manifest through network structure such as central hubs, high flow intermediaries, and coordinated neighborhoods. This paper presents a time respecting, leakage safe (causal) graph feature extraction protocol for temporal transaction networks and evaluates its utility for illicit entity classification. Using the Elliptic dataset, we construct directed transaction graphs and compute interpretable structural descriptors, including degree statistics, PageRank, HITS hub or authority scores, k-core indices, and neighborhood reachability measures. To prevent look ahead bias, we additionally compute causal variants of graph features using only edges observed up to each timestep. A Random Forest classifier trained with strict temporal splits achieves strong discrimination on a held out future test period (ROC-AUC about 0.85, Average Precision about 0.54). Although transaction attributes remain the dominant predictive signal, graph derived features provide complementary interpretability and enable risk context analysis for investigation workflows. We further assess operational utility using Precision at k and evaluate probability reliability via calibration curves and Brier scores, showing that calibrated models yield better aligned probabilities for triage. Overall, the results support causal graph feature extraction as a practical and interpretable augmentation for temporal fraud detection pipelines.

</details>


### [443] [A new Uncertainty Principle in Machine Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06634)
*V. Dolotin,A. Morozov*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Error


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Error

Method: Error

Result: Error

Conclusion: Error

Abstract: Many scientific problems in the context of machine learning can be reduced to the search of polynomial answers in appropriate variables. The Hevisidization of arbitrary polynomial is actually provided by one-and-the same two-layer expression. What prevents the use of this simple idea is the fatal degeneracy of the Heaviside and sigmoid expansions, which traps the steepest-descent evolution at the bottom of canyons, close to the starting point, but far from the desired true minimum. This problem is unavoidable and can be formulated as a peculiar uncertainty principle -- the sharper the minimum, the smoother the canyons. It is a direct analogue of the usual one, which is the pertinent property of the more familiar Fourier expansion. Standard machine learning software fights with this problem empirically, for example, by testing evolutions, originated at randomly distributed starting points and then selecting the best one. Surprisingly or not, phenomena and problems, encountered in ML application to science are pure scientific and belong to physics, not to computer science. On the other hand, they sound slightly different and shed new light on the well-known phenomena -- for example, extend the uncertainty principle from Fourier and, later, wavelet analysis to a new peculiar class of nearly singular sigmoid functions.

</details>


### [444] [Graph Property Inference in Small Language Models: Effects of Representation and Inference Strategy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06635)
*Michal Podstawski*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 小规模指令调优语言模型在图属性推理任务中，性能高度依赖于输入表示的结构组织方式和推理策略设计，而非仅由模型规模决定。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管语言模型在自然语言接口任务上取得进展，但小规模模型在文本形式的关系结构上推断形式属性的能力尚不明确。理解结构化推理成功或失败的条件对于在基于图的领域中应用小模型至关重要。

Method: 对小规模指令调优语言模型进行图论属性推理的系统研究，分离输入表示和推理策略的作用。使用多样化的局部和全局图度量，分析不同表示方法对性能的影响。

Result: 结构性能对关系信息的组织方式高度敏感。保持邻域结构的表示能持续改善估计稳定性和序数一致性，而多分支推理在不同配置下产生最可靠的聚合增益。

Conclusion: 小语言模型的图属性推理能力关键取决于表征组织和推理设计。结构能力不仅由模型规模决定，还受关系信息编码方式和预测引导方式的影响。这些发现为在受限模型容量下改进结构化推理提供了实用杠杆。

Abstract: Recent progress in language modeling has expanded the range of tasks that can be approached through natural language interfaces, including problems that require structured reasoning. However, it remains unclear how effectively limited-capacity language models can infer formal properties of relational structures when those structures are presented in textual form. Understanding the conditions under which structured reasoning succeeds or fails is essential for applying small models in graph-based domains.
  We conduct a systematic study of graph-theoretic property inference in small instruction-tuned language models, isolating the roles of input representation and reasoning strategy. Across a diverse set of local and global graph metrics, we find that structural performance is highly sensitive to how relational information is organized. Representations that preserve neighborhood structure consistently improve estimation stability and ordinal consistency, while multi-branch reasoning yields the most reliable aggregate gains across configurations.
  These results show that graph property inference in small language models depends critically on representational organization and inference design. Structural competence is therefore shaped not only by model scale, but by how relational information is encoded and how predictions are elicited. The findings identify practical levers for improving structured inference under constrained model capacity.

</details>


### [445] [SmartBench: Evaluating LLMs in Smart Homes with Anomalous Device States and Behavioral Contexts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06636)
*Qingsong Zou,Zhi Yan,Zhiyao Xu,Kuofeng Gao,Jingyu Xiao,Yong Jiang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SmartBench是首个为LLM设计的智能家居数据集，包含正常和异常设备状态及状态转换上下文，用于评估LLM在智能家居异常检测中的能力。实验显示主流LLM在异常检测上表现不佳。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究主要关注LLM理解和执行用户指令，但智能家居助手的关键功能是检测环境异常状态。需要LLM既能准确判断异常，又能提供解释或建议。

Method: 提出SmartBench数据集，包含正常和异常的设备状态及状态转换上下文。在13个主流LLM上评估其异常检测性能，包括上下文无关和上下文相关的异常类别。

Result: 大多数最先进的LLM在异常检测上表现不佳。Claude-Sonnet-4.5在上下文无关异常类别上仅66.1%准确率，在上下文相关异常上仅57.8%。实验表明下一代LLM智能家居助手远未达到有效检测和处理异常的能力。

Conclusion: 当前LLM在智能家居异常检测方面能力有限，需要进一步研究提升。SmartBench数据集为评估和提升LLM在智能家居异常检测能力提供了基准。下一代LLM智能家居助手仍需改进才能有效处理异常情况。

Abstract: Due to the strong context-awareness capabilities demonstrated by large language models (LLMs), recent research has begun exploring their integration into smart home assistants to help users manage and adjust their living environments. While LLMs have been shown to effectively understand user needs and provide appropriate responses, most existing studies primarily focus on interpreting and executing user behaviors or instructions.
  However, a critical function of smart home assistants is the ability to detect when the home environment is in an anomalous state. This involves two key requirements: the LLM must accurately determine whether an anomalous condition is present, and provide either a clear explanation or actionable suggestions.
  To enhance the anomaly detection capabilities of next-generation LLM-based smart home assistants, we introduce SmartBench, which is the first smart home dataset designed for LLMs, containing both normal and anomalous device states as well as normal and anomalous device state transition contexts. We evaluate 13 mainstream LLMs on this benchmark. The experimental results show that most state-of-the-art models cannot achieve good anomaly detection performance. For example, Claude-Sonnet-4.5 achieves only 66.1% detection accuracy on context-independent anomaly categories, and performs even worse on context-dependent anomalies, with an accuracy of only 57.8%. More experimental results suggest that next-generation LLM-based smart home assistants are still far from being able to effectively detect and handle anomalous conditions in the smart home environment. Our dataset is publicly available at https://github.com/horizonsinzqs/SmartBench.

</details>


### [446] [HEARTS: Benchmarking LLM Reasoning on Health Time Series](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06638)
*Sirui Li,Shuhan Xiao,Mihir Joshi,Ahmed Metwally,Daniel McDuff,Wei Wang,Yuzhe Yang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: HEARTS是一个统一的健康时间序列基准测试，评估LLM在16个真实世界数据集、12个健康领域、20种信号模态和110个任务上的分层推理能力，发现LLM表现远逊于专用模型，且在多步时间推理上存在困难。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准测试仅涵盖少数健康时间序列模态和任务，无法反映真实世界生理建模的多样化领域和复杂时间依赖性，需要建立一个统一的评估框架来衡量LLM在健康时间序列上的分层推理能力。

Method: 引入HEARTS基准，整合16个真实世界数据集，涵盖12个健康领域和20种信号模态，定义了包含感知、推理、生成和演绎四个核心能力的110个任务分类体系，评估了14个最先进的LLM在超过2万个测试样本上的表现。

Result: LLM表现显著低于专用模型，其性能与通用推理分数仅弱相关；LLM常依赖简单启发式方法，在多步时间推理上表现不佳；性能随时间复杂度增加而下降，同一模型家族内失败模式相似，表明单纯扩展模型规模不足以解决问题。

Conclusion: HEARTS通过量化这些差距，为开发能够推理多样化健康信号的下一代LLM智能体提供了一个标准化测试平台和持续更新的基准，推动时间序列分析从狭义分析向通用推理的转变。

Abstract: The rise of large language models (LLMs) has shifted time series analysis from narrow analytics to general-purpose reasoning. Yet, existing benchmarks cover only a small set of health time series modalities and tasks, failing to reflect the diverse domains and extensive temporal dependencies inherent in real-world physiological modeling. To bridge these gaps, we introduce HEARTS (Health Reasoning over Time Series), a unified benchmark for evaluating hierarchical reasoning capabilities of LLMs over general health time series. HEARTS integrates 16 real-world datasets across 12 health domains and 20 signal modalities, and defines a comprehensive taxonomy of 110 tasks grouped into four core capabilities: Perception, Inference, Generation, and Deduction. Evaluating 14 state-of-the-art LLMs on more than 20K test samples reveals intriguing findings. First, LLMs substantially underperform specialized models, and their performance is only weakly related to general reasoning scores. Moreover, LLMs often rely on simple heuristics and struggle with multi-step temporal reasoning. Finally, performance declines with increasing temporal complexity, with similar failure modes within model families, indicating that scaling alone is insufficient. By making these gaps measurable, HEARTS provides a standardized testbed and living benchmark for developing next-generation LLM agents capable of reasoning over diverse health signals.

</details>


### [447] [SR-TTT: Surprisal-Aware Residual Test-Time Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06642)
*Swamynathan V P*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SR-TTT模型通过引入基于损失门控的稀疏记忆机制，解决了传统测试时训练语言模型在精确回忆任务上的灾难性失败问题，在保持O(1)内存占用的同时，能有效记住关键信息。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统测试时训练语言模型虽然实现了理论上无限上下文窗口和O(1)内存占用，但在精确回忆任务（如"大海捞针"）上存在灾难性失败，因为快速权重机制会过度压缩上下文，导致重要信息被后续token更新覆盖而遗忘。

Method: 提出SR-TTT（基于惊喜感知的残差测试时训练），在TTT骨干网络基础上增加损失门控的稀疏记忆机制，动态将不可压缩的、高度惊喜的token路由到传统的精确注意力残差缓存中，对低熵背景上下文保持O(1)内存，仅对关键信息使用精确注意力。

Result: SR-TTT解决了传统TTT在精确回忆任务上的失败，在保持O(1)内存占用的前提下，能够有效记住关键信息，同时提供了完整的开源实现、训练脚本和预训练权重。

Conclusion: 通过结合基于惊喜感知的稀疏记忆机制，SR-TTT成功解决了测试时训练语言模型在精确回忆任务上的缺陷，在保持内存效率的同时提高了关键信息的保留能力。
